tours.name: Keukenhof, Tulip Farm, Flower Fields & Delft City
tours.description:
Keukenhof, Tulip Farm, Flower Fields & Delft City

This wonderful seasonal tour covers two magnificent Dutch highlights in one day! Wander through the world’s largest flower garden the ‘Keukenhof’ and surround yourself in old world charm as you walk with your guide through the cobblestone streets of historic Delft.

Price

1 Person (Ages 7+) €540
2 People (Ages 7+) €590
3 People (Ages 7+) €660
4 People (Ages 7+) €690
5 People (Ages 7+) €740
6 People (Ages 7+) €790

Tour duration

7 hours

Keukenhof

The Keukenhof is world renowned and the largest flower park in the world. Enjoy dazzling displays of tulips, hyacinths, daffodils, orchids, roses, carnations, irises, lilies and many other flowers. This incredible flower extravaganza attracts visitors from all over the globe.

Delft

Get a taste of old-world charm as you wander around historic Delft. Walk with your guide through cobblestone streets lined with quaint houses, canals, and historic churches. Picture perfect Delft is known for the painter Johannes Vermeer, William of Orange and last but not least Delft's world famous earthenware 'Delft Blue'.

Meet & Connect 

All our tours begin with getting to know our guests and understanding their wishes. The itinerary is flexible and we can add special requests and will not rush you around. Starting from your hotel or vacation address, your private guide will pick you up with our comfortable car to start this beautiful day.

About:

At our life art drawing class, we will give you a short talk on the history of life art and will show you examples of the different kinds of work, both realist and impressionist, that characterize this fascinating artistic discipline. You will be shown several different techniques, including how to invoke a sense of scale and motion. We will provide painting materials and a model for you to draw, giving you an amazing opportunity to capture the essence of a real art model.

tours.name: Amsterdam Highlights - City Walking Tour
tours.description:
Amsterdam City Highlights Tour: 2,5 hrs
Overview:
On this historic walking tour we'll learn about the stories and events that shaped the city's unique character. We’ll delve into the humble beginning of the city, explore 'old Amsterdam,' embark on a historical voyage with the VOC, and uncover the city's progressive past. Discovering hidden gems, we’ll stroll along some of Amsterdam's 100 km of canals, and cover the story of one of the most well-known figures from history, Anne Frank.

This tour provides a comprehensive overview of Amsterdam's rich history, from its humble beginnings to its role as a global trade hub and its enduring legacy as a city of freedom and culture.

tours.name: Day Tour to Köln from Amsterdam
tours.description:
Set off on an exciting journey that begins and ends in Amsterdam, taking you to one of Europe’s most captivating cities: Cologne. This unique tour blends history, culture, and architecture into a single day.

Your first destination is Cologne, one of Germany’s oldest cities, nestled on the banks of the Rhine. Behold the majestic Kölner Dom, an UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of Europe’s finest examples of Gothic architecture. Explore the Old Town, where cobblestone streets and historic façades transport you back in time. Don’t miss the impressive St. Martin’s Church, a beautiful Romanesque landmark. Then, take a scenic walk across the Hohenzollern Bridge, famous for its love locks and panoramic views of the cathedral and the river. Before continuing your journey, enjoy free time in Freedom Square, where you can sample local delicacies or simply soak up the vibrant atmosphere.

After a day filled with remarkable sights and cultural richness, return to Amsterdam with memories of your journey through Germany.

What's included
Round-trip transportation by bus from Amsterdam.
Bilingual professional guide.
What's not included
Lunch
Hotel Pick up and Drop off
Itinerary

tours.name: Highlights of Amsterdam Cruise  - Departure Herengracht 128 on boat Stan Huygens
tours.description:
Discover the highlights of Amsterdam the local way!

What better way to finish your morning in Amsterdam with a combination of the two on this 1,5hr highlights of Amsterdam cruise of the canals. Your captain will welcome you aboard with a serving of apple pie (with optional whipped cream!), and a drink of your choice. During the cruise your captain/host will show you the highlights of the Amsterdam canals, including the 17th century canal belt, Jordaan area, Amstel river among our other favourite spots. During the cruise we’ll pause for a few minutes to offer you a second drink.

This cruise is perfect for all ages, and includes a 90min small group tour (max. 24 guests), a slice of apple pie and 2 drinks. The tour is €47,50 per adult, and available for €30 for kids under 14.

tours.name: Knitted Handbag Workshop
tours.description:
The chunky knit is back and this time we're getting our hands involved! In just two hours at our Craft Café you will learn the simple technique of knitting with your hands and skip home with a cute, statement handbag.

The workshop will show you how to build your bag in just a few simple steps. Included is a ball of Scheepjes Cool Stuff Yarn (of which there are a variety of colours to choose from) and a pattern just in case you want to make this bag again.

So get a group of friends together and come and make this year's sweetest bag of the season!

*Do you want to continue knitting at home after the course, but still need some guidance every now and then? Simply book a slot in our Craft Café.

Address: Van der Hoopstraat 70HS, 1051 VK, Amsterdam

tours.name: Beginner Crochet Workshop: Bandana
tours.description:
If you've been dreaming about diving into the world of crochet but haven't yet had the chance, then this is a great workshop for you! With this package you will learn the basics of crochet while making your own bandana in 2 x 2 hour sessions in our Craft Café. You can choose to include your materials in your booking - we have a selection of yarn colours for you to choose from in our craft store - or buy your own before the lesson. And if you'd like to continue your crocheting journey at home, you can always buy more yarn and hooks from us!

What you will learn:

• chain stitch, single crochet stitch
• how to increase
• how to make straps
• how to start and end your work

Highlights

• Learn the basics of crocheting
• Learn to set up and finish your work
• Go home with your own bandana
• Guidance by a crochet expert

tours.name: Canal Cruise and Museum Rembrandthuis Combination Ticket
tours.description:
Discover Amsterdam from two perspectives with this combination ticket: a scenic canal cruise and entry to the Rembrandt House Museum.

Start your experience on the water with a relaxing 1-hour open boat cruise through the city’s historic canals. Sail past iconic sights and enjoy the atmosphere of Amsterdam from a comfortable Flagship boat, with live commentary from your skipper and host. Drinks are available for purchase on board.

After your cruise, head to the Rembrandt House Museum, located in the original 17th-century townhouse where the artist lived and worked for nearly 20 years. With a multimedia guide, explore Rembrandt’s studio, view his etchings and drawings, and get an authentic impression of his daily life and creative process.

This combination offers the perfect mix of culture and relaxation: experience Amsterdam’s charm from

tours.description:
Private Food & Red Light Tour – Real Amsterdam in 3 Hours

🍟 Dutch Bites | 🍷 Drinks | 🚶‍♂️ Private Guide | ❤️ Stories from Spui to the Red Light

Overview

This is not your average food tour. This is Real Amsterdam — with a full plate and a side of spicy stories.

On this 3-hour private walking experience, we guide you through cozy brown cafés, Surinamese snack spots, historic spice alleys, and cheeky corners of the Red Light District. About

Ditch the typical team dinner and connect over food, laughter, and local flavor. On this private corporate food tour, your group will explore three of Amsterdam’s most iconic neighborhoods — Spui, the UNESCO canals, and the Jordaan — while enjoying 10+ tastings at 5+ authentic stops.

Led by your own expert local host, you’ll share stories and bites from a 200-year-old stroopwafel bakery, a canal-house cheese cellar, and family-run brown cafés — the kind of places locals actually love. Between tastings, your guide weaves in quirky history and fun challenges that turn colleagues into teammates.

It’s the perfect way to reward your staff, welcome international guests, or kick off your company offsite — relaxed, interactive, and full of personality.

tours.name: Combo: Van Gogh Museum + Red Light District Guided Tour - Semi-Private (ENGLISH)
tours.description:
Vincent Van Gogh wasn’t shy about indulging in a few dark pleasures, and after this tour, you’ll understand why. We will trace some of those vices in an engaging and – hopefully – dignified manner on this 5 to 5.5 hour, semi-private tour. Skip the line with our guides who will provide tickets that are valid for the whole day. We designed this tour for first-time visitors to learn about the relationship between the artist and Amsterdam’s iconic Red Light District, a relationship that resulted in Van Gogh painting a few scandalous works of art.

You’ve probably heard about one of the world’s most famous painters, Vincent Van Gogh. But what do you actually know about this Dutch artist? We’ll introduce you to the man behind the famous sunflowers and self-portraits on this intimate, small group tour. Learn about him through his iconic paintings of people eating potatoes and of his own bedroom, or maybe his “Wheat field with Crows” or “Yellow House.” We will visit the world’s largest collection of Van Gogh’s works to learn about his turbulent life stretching from his days in Holland to his dramatic ending in France. And yes, don’t worry, we’ll discuss that whole ear incident.

Then after a break for lunch, we’ll keep it as dignified and serious as possible as we discuss the legal drug vendors, the leather neighborhood, and the smoky “coffee shops” that attract people from around the world. Cast away your guilt and judgement, and let’s discuss the etiquette and laws that will allow you to appreciate this district to its fullest after the tour. Our professional guides will lead you through the salacious streets and coffee shops of the Red Light District, following in the footsteps of Van Gogh himself.

Historic Bruges is one of Europe's most charming cities!
Duration

11 Hours

About

History
Historic Bruges is one of Europe's most charming cities. Bruges has most of its medieval architecture intact, making it one of the most well-preserved medieval towns in Europe. Packed with picturesque alleys and ancient churches, the entire medieval city center is an UNESCO World Heritage site since 2000.

More…

Bruges is forever in competition with Amsterdam and Stockholm for the title of the '' Venice of the North '', as there are so many opulent mansions and characteristic old houses located along its canals. Explore the city from the water on a canal cruise or get the 13th-century feeling while wandering around in the historical city center.

Bruges is also well known for its local beers, lace and chocolate making, all of which you can enjoy in numerous inns and artisanal shops.

By private Minivan or Minibus

You will drive to Bruges with a comfortable Mercedes Benz minivan up to 7 people or a Mercedes Benz Minibus up to 19 people.

Our vehicles are equipped with any comfort as air conditioning, tinted windows, USB phone connections and free bottles of water for the passengers.

tours.name: Shared Off The Beaten Path, Hidden Gems Canal Cruise
tours.description:
Drift different through Amsterdam's hidden canals with local captains who were born here. While other boats pack 50+ people with megaphones, we keep it small and real. Your captains Jannah & Beer know which bridge lights up best, where locals drink coffee, and have real stories from growing up on these waters.

We skip tourist traps for secret spots where Amsterdam actually lives. You'll see quiet canals, local hangouts, and hidden corners that even many locals forget exist. This isn't a museum boat - it's like floating through Amsterdam in your friend's living room.

Come as you are, kick off shoes, grab blankets, and help yourself to drinks. Amsterdam moves fast. We move at water speed. No rush, no stress - just good people, calm water, and authentic connections. Small groups mean you can actually chat and ask questions.

No fixed script, no Heineken hats, no loud music. Just effortless vibes that feel cool without trying too hard. You'll get a Polaroid and our insider map to remember floating through Amsterdam like locals do. Perfect for conscious travelers who want authenticity over luxury.
Welcome aboard. Or as we like to say, welcome home!

What's included
90-minute shared canal cruise
Small group experience (max 6

tours.name: Improv Spectacular | The Famous Boom Chicago Comedy Show
tours.description:
Enjoy 30 years of Boom comedy innovation in one show! This fast-paced funny night features our top cast making you (and themselves) laugh while waiters bring drinks to your table. The evening starts with short-form improv and games with rules, bells, and lots of audience suggestions. We need a job and a movie-style! Ding. Let’s go!

Then after a break, our long-form improvisation creates a whole new world of characters, scenes, and funny situations based on stories inspired by just one word. You will be amazed! After the show, on many nights we present a free third act where we test new material for our new show. Bring your friends and enjoy a great night at Boom Chicago! Ding ding ding!

tours.name: Tour em Português pelo Centro Histórico de Amsterdam | Dam, Bairro Judeu e Mercado das Flores
tours.description:
Você sabia que essa cidade europeia começou sendo um pequeno povoado de pescadores nas margens do rio Amstel e hoje em dia é uma das mais importantes cidades comerciais da Europa?

Começaremos caminhando pelo centro histórico e chegaremos à Praça Dam, onde faremos uma introdução da história de Amsterdam e dos vários acontecimentos históricos que presenciou, desde o domínio espanhol, passando pelo francês e, mais tarde, pelo alemão.

Também passaremos pelo bairro judeu da cidade, o Museu Rembrandt e o Mercado Waterlooplein, o maior e mais antigo mercado das pulgas da cidade. Artesanato, roupas, lembranças e muito mais. Você vai resistir?

Além da parte histórica, também veremos mais sobre o dia-a-dia dos moradores da cidade passeando pelo Mercado das Flores, um dos lugares mais icônicos de Amsterdam.

Finalmente, iremos à loja Cheese & More Flower Market para fazer uma degustação de queijos holandeses. O final perfeito para o tour!

O que está incluído

Guia de língua portuguesa.
Degustação de queijos típicos holandeses.

tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s vibrant neighborhoods on a colorful flower bike, passing historic canals, the Anne Frank House, and lively squares. Hear quirky stories and capture unforgettable photos in just 1.5 hours.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum Special Small Group Tour
tours.description: Join a 90-minute tour at Rijksmuseum and feel the masters’ genius come alive. Walk through history with a passionate guide, witnessing art as if you’re right there with the creators. An unforgettable journey into masterpieces.

tours.name: Amsterdam Sunset Cruise Experience with Live Guide and Open Bar
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals at sunset, with stunning views, a live guide sharing stories, unlimited drinks, and cozy comfort. Perfect for romance, friends, or celebrations—unforgettable moments await.

tours.name: Top 10 Tastes of Amsterdam: Food & Culture Bike Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s charming canals and hidden streets, savoring top Dutch treats like fluffy poffertjes, savory saté, and crispy herring. Enjoy local drinks and stories behind the city’s rich food heritage in just 3 hours.

tours.name: Urban Axe Throwing
tours.description: Unleash your inner Viking at Amsterdam’s only dedicated axe throwing venue. With 5 lanes, interactive games, and live projections, it’s a thrilling, modern twist perfect for friends, parties, or solo fun.

tours.name: FREE Tour storico
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s rich history and vibrant culture on a flexible tour. Walk through iconic sites, learn about its golden age, multicultural vibe, and unique lifestyle—all while discovering hidden gems and local stories.

tours.name: Dinner Cruise - Lunch Cruise - Brunch Cruise Amsterdam
tours.description: Enjoy a cozy 3-hour private boat cruise in Amsterdam with a delicious three-course dinner, stunning illuminated bridges, and a relaxed atmosphere. Perfect for small groups seeking a memorable, scenic dining experience.

tours.name: Candlelight Booze Cruise incl. Welcome Liquor & Snack
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s glowing canals on a cozy, illuminated boat. Sip vanilla vodka, enjoy festive lights, and soak in the winter magic—an enchanting hour of warmth, wonder, and city sparkle.

tours.name: Candlelight Cocktail Cruise incl. Welcome Liquor & Snack
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s glowing canals on a cozy, illuminated boat, sipping vanilla vodka and enjoying festive lights, warm blankets, and lively stories—an enchanting winter celebration on water.

tours.name: Candlelight Cruise incl. Bites Box & Snack
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s glowing canals on a cozy, illuminated boat, sipping vanilla vodka and enjoying festive lights, warm blankets, and lively stories—an enchanting winter celebration on water.

tours.name: Pancake Boat Tour
tours.description: Sail Amsterdam’s canals on a luxurious, handcrafted electric boat. Enjoy stunning views, fascinating stories, and unlimited beer and wine—all in a refined, relaxed setting perfect for couples and small groups.

tours.name: Financial History Tour
tours.description: Step into Amsterdam’s financial past, from the first stock exchange to WWII bank heists. Walk historic streets, visit iconic banks, and uncover how the city shaped modern capitalism in just 2.5 hours.

tours.name: World War II Tour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s WWII history in a 3-hour private walking tour. Explore resistance, collaboration, and royal stories, seeing how the city endured five years of Nazi occupation and its lasting scars today.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum Tour
tours.description: Explore the Rijksmuseum with a private art historian, uncover Dutch Golden Age secrets, meet legendary figures, and see masterpieces by Vermeer, Rembrandt, and Van Gogh—all in 2.5 hours of immersive Dutch history and art.

tours.name: Privé Amsterdam Noord Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam Noord’s vibrant streets, enjoy scenic ferry rides, explore innovative architecture, visit historic sites, and end at the NDSM-werf with street art and graffiti, all on a lively guided bike tour.

tours.name: Amsterdam Walk with Enthusiastic & Fun Guide
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s charming canals, historic streets, and hidden gardens on a lively 3-hour walk. Learn its fascinating history, enjoy fun stories, and snap perfect photos along the way.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Amsterdam Groepstour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s secrets in 3 hours: hidden alleyways, lively stories from locals, iconic sights, and a special treat at the city’s oldest café. Walk, learn, and enjoy the true spirit of the city.

tours.name: Heineken Experience Kingsday Boat Party
tours.description: Celebrate King’s Day on a lively 1.5-hour canal cruise with ice-cold Heineken, great music, and vibrant vibes. Party through Amsterdam’s waterways surrounded by friends, fun, and unforgettable moments.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans e-bike tour - Privé Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Noord Holland’s scenic landscape to Zaanse Schans, explore historic windmills, visit a cheese farm and clogs, and enjoy a relaxed ride with a friendly guide—perfect for all ages.

tours.name: Giethoorn, Volendam & Edam Tour from Amsterdam: Small Group & Boat Cruise
tours.description: Explore the Netherlands beyond the crowds with a cozy, storytelling-filled road trip. Visit a traditional farm, taste Gouda and Stroopwafels, see historic villages, and glide through Giethoorn’s peaceful canals—an authentic, personal adventure.

tours.name: Alluring Sensual Art Painting Class m/f
tours.description: Unleash your creativity and flirtation in this 90-minute sensual art class in Amsterdam. Paint a live model, sip wine, and enjoy a stylish private bar—perfect for couples, friends, or celebrations. No experience needed!

tours.name: Traditional Dutch Delft Tile Painting Workshop
tours.description: Create your own Delft Blue tile in a fun, hands-on workshop in Amsterdam. Learn its rich history, choose your design, and paint with expert guidance—then take your masterpiece home in a beautiful gift box.

tours.name: Semi Private Couple Ticket | Prosecco Bottle Included
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s iconic canals and hidden gems on a sleek electric boat. Sip drinks, listen to lively stories, and enjoy stunning sights like the Red Light District, Skinny Bridge, and Dancing Houses—all in one unforgettable hour.

tours.name: Comedy Walks© Amsterdam City Centre
tours.description: Step into Amsterdam’s streets for a hilarious 90-minute Comedy Walk©, where the city becomes your comedy stage. Enjoy witty jokes and lively stories as talented performers bring the streets to life with humor. Perfect for those aged 14 and up, this lively tour guarantees laughs around every corner.

tours.name: Royal Experience
tours.description: Experience the royal legacy of diamonds with a private tour at Royal Coster Diamonds, the world's oldest diamond polishing factory. Marvel at the Royal 201 diamond and a Koh-i-Noor replica, explore exclusive rooms, and enjoy tax-free shopping. Conclude your visit with a sparkling gift to cherish.

tours.name: Amsterdam City Tour and Windmills • 3 Hours
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s historic canals, 17th-century houses, and vibrant markets in just a few hours. Visit Zaanse Schans windmills, enjoy scenic drives, and customize your tour for an unforgettable Dutch experience.

tours.name: Giethoorn Tour • 7 Hours
tours.description: Relax on peaceful canals, explore charming thatched-roof farmhouses, and sail in a traditional punter. Enjoy a private ride from Amsterdam, with options for guides, luxury boats, and scenic stops like the Afsluitdijk.

tours.name: Designer Outlet Fashion Tour • 10 Hours
tours.description: Shop top designer brands like Michael Kors and Tommy Hilfiger at stylish outlets in Roermond, then explore historic streets and dine in charming restaurants—all with a private driver to make your day seamless.

tours.name: Delft, The Hague and Rotterdam Tour • 8 Hours
tours.description: Explore Delft’s historic streets and renowned ceramics, then visit nearby The Hague’s museums and government sites or Rotterdam’s vibrant port and modern architecture—all in a comfortable, private minivan tour.

tours.name: Comedy Walks© Eindhoven
tours.description: Join comedian Hermes Ahmadi on a lively 1.5-hour walk through Eindhoven’s streets, starting at the Anton Philips statue. Uncover quirky secrets about the city’s architecture, including why the station resembles a radio and the story behind its colorful crossings. A fun, witty tour for curious explorers.

tours.name: Queer Night Tour
tours.description: Join a lively night walk through Amsterdam’s historic queer neighborhoods, guided by a local expert. Hear stories, visit iconic bars, and connect with like-minded people in a vibrant, community-driven experience.

tours.name: Luxury Boutique Boat tour with Optional Unlimited Drinks
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s scenic canals on a luxurious electric boat, guided by an expert captain. Sip unlimited beer and wine as you soak in stunning views, fascinating stories, and unforgettable city charm.

tours.name: Privé Waterland Fietstour
tours.description: Cycle through stunning Noord-Holland landscapes, cross the IJ by ferry, and learn how locals battle water on this 4-hour tour. Enjoy scenic views, a cozy café break, and stories of land reclaimed from the sea.

tours.name: Amsterdamse Stadswandeling
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s enchanting winter lights, historic canals, and lively streets. Visit the Negen Straatjes, Westertoren, Anne Frank House, and uncover stories from rebellious provo’s to vibrant neighborhoods—all in 2 hours.

tours.name: Bubble Football & Dodgeball
tours.description: Jump into fast-paced dodgeball or bounce around in inflatable bubbles for an hour of laughs, teamwork, and adrenaline. Perfect for any group ready to unleash their competitive spirit and create unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Tzar - the iconic private boat of Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam's canals aboard a classic saloon boat, guided by a knowledgeable captain. Enjoy a welcome drink and the flexibility of indoor or outdoor seating, perfect for any weather. This intimate cruise offers a unique blend of history, comfort, and stunning views, making it a memorable adventure.

tours.name: Day-trip Tour from Amsterdam to Giethoorn with boat tour included
tours.description: Experience the enchanting village of Giethoorn on a guided tour that combines a scenic boat cruise through tranquil canals with free time to explore charming streets lined with thatched-roof houses and vibrant gardens. Discover hidden gems and unwind in this picturesque setting, making unforgettable memories along the way.

tours.name: Day-trip Tour from Amsterdam to Zaanse Schans and Giethoorn
tours.description: Experience the best of Dutch culture and nature in one day! Explore the historic windmills and workshops of Zaanse Schans, then unwind in Giethoorn's serene canals. Enjoy hands-on cheese and clog-making demonstrations, and take a relaxing boat ride through picturesque waterways, creating unforgettable memories along the way.

tours.name: Private Tour from Amsterdam to Zaanse Schans and Giethoorn
tours.description: Experience the charm of the Netherlands in one day by visiting Zaanse Schans and Giethoorn. Explore historic windmills, witness traditional cheese-making, and enjoy a serene boat ride through picturesque canals. This unique blend of culture and nature promises unforgettable memories and stunning photo opportunities.

tours.name: Private Tour from Amsterdam to Giethoorn with Boat Tour Included
tours.description: Experience the enchanting beauty of Giethoorn on a guided tour that combines a scenic boat cruise through tranquil canals with free time to explore charming thatched-roof houses and vibrant gardens. Discover hidden gems and enjoy the rich history of this picturesque village while relaxing in its serene atmosphere.

tours.name: Discount SmartWalk Pride Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a self-guided WhatsApp tour through Amsterdam's vibrant Pride history. Covering 7 km in about two hours, this unique experience allows you to uncover the rich LGBTQI+ heritage and hidden gems at your own pace, making it a memorable journey through the heart of the city.

tours.name: Evening Cruise from Anne Frank House
tours.description: Sail past Amsterdam’s iconic sights like the Skinny Bridge and Jordaan in a cozy, heated boat. Capture stunning photos, enjoy drinks at the café, and learn city secrets from expert skippers—all in just one hour.

tours.name: Kids Indoor Bubble Football
tours.description: Jump into a lively indoor football game with bumping, bouncing, and laughter. Play for an hour with 8 bubbles included—perfect for birthdays or fun gatherings. Add more bubbles for larger groups!

tours.name: Discreet Luxury Smoke-Friendly Canal Cruise
tours.description: Sail Amsterdam’s canals on a luxurious, handcrafted electric boat. Enjoy stunning views, fascinating stories, and unlimited beer and wine—all in a relaxed, elegant setting designed for comfort and discretion.

tours.name: Axe Throwing & Bubble Football
tours.description: Challenge friends to a fun-filled hour of axe throwing and bubble football—perfect for parties, bachelor outings, or team events. Unleash your competitive spirit in this lively Amsterdam adventure.

tours.name: See Diamonds In Style Tour
tours.description: Step into GASSAN’s world of diamonds and watches, watch the magic of gemstone cutting, learn the 4 C’s, and see our revolutionary GASSAN 121. Enjoy champagne and explore luxury jewelry collections at your leisure.

tours.name: Open Boat Tour from Anne Frank Museum
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s canals on a heated electric boat, marvel at stunning light art, and snap perfect photos from the panoramic deck. Enjoy lively stories, Dutch and English guides, and a free mulled wine at the start.

tours.name: Privé Amsterdam Essentials 1 uur Fietstour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s highlights in just 2 hours: cycle through Jordaan, Vondelpark, and the iconic canals, while hearing fascinating stories. Perfect for families, with a relaxed pace and plenty of photo opportunities.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum, Rijks Museum & Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 7-hour private tour of Amsterdam, blending a scenic walking adventure with a visit to the renowned Rijksmuseum. Discover hidden gems and local favorites while learning about the city's rich history and culture. Enjoy a personalized experience at your own pace, creating unforgettable memories in this vibrant capital.

tours.name: Diamond Factory Tour
tours.description: See Amsterdam’s diamond heritage firsthand in a 30-minute guided tour. Watch master craftsmen shape sparkling gems, admire the Koh-i-Noor replica, and enjoy tax-free shopping—an unforgettable glimpse into royal brilliance.

tours.name: Haarlem walking Tour
tours.description: Explore Haarlem, the Netherlands' most beautiful city, just 15 minutes from Amsterdam. This captivating 2.5-hour private tour takes you through medieval streets, showcasing stunning architecture, historic landmarks, and charming gardens. Discover the rich culture and character of Haarlem while visiting iconic sites like the Adriaan Mill and the Frans Hals Museum.

tours.name: King's Day 2026 Open Boat Cruise - All Drinks Included
tours.description: Celebrate King’s Day with a lively 4-hour canal cruise through Amsterdam’s orange waters, featuring unlimited drinks, music, and the best crew. Join the fun on April 27th and toast to the holiday!

tours.name: Private Cruise on Diana — Your Floating Living Room
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s stunning tall ships on a private boat with front-row views, unlimited drinks, and a cozy, stylish vibe. Enjoy a stress-free, intimate experience away from crowds, surrounded by breathtaking maritime beauty.

tours.name: 24-Hour Cargo Bike Rentals
tours.description: Rent a bike for 24 hours with two locks, a city map, and a coffee or water—perfect for exploring at your own pace and soaking in the sights on two wheels.

tours.name: 48-Hour Cargo Bike Rentals
tours.description: Ride through the city for 48 hours on a bike equipped with locks, a map, and a refreshing drink. Explore at your own pace and enjoy the freedom of two days of adventure.

tours.name: 3-Day Cargo Bike Rentals
tours.description: Ride through the city on a bike for three days, equipped with locks, a map, and a refreshing drink. Explore at your own pace and enjoy the freedom of the open road.

tours.name: 48-Hour Bakfiets or Tandem Bicycle Rental
tours.description: Ride through the city on a cozy bakfiets or tandem bike, equipped with locks, a map, and a coffee. Explore at your own pace for 48 hours and enjoy a relaxed, memorable adventure on two wheels.

tours.name: 3 Days Bakfiets or Tandem Bicycle Rental
tours.description: Ride through the city on a cozy bakfiets or tandem bike, equipped with locks, a map, and a coffee. Explore at your own pace for three days and enjoy the freedom of two wheels and fresh air.

tours.name: ACC-DMA toegangsticket
tours.description: Step into the Diamant Museum Amsterdam and test your skills in a thrilling laser room challenge. Dodge lasers, retrieve the giant diamond, and experience a daring heist in this one-hour adventure full of sparkle and suspense.

tours.name: Private walking tour Alkmaar.
tours.description: Discover the charm of Alkmaar on a captivating 2.5-hour private tour. Explore iconic sites like the Grote Sint-Laurenskerk, the Cheese Market, and hidden gardens, while indulging in local beer at the Beer Museum. This unique experience combines history, culture, and delightful flavors, making it a memorable adventure for your group.

tours.name: Amsterdam Canal Cruise • Private Tour
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s secret canals on a luxurious electric boat, enjoying stunning sights, rich history, and unlimited drinks from our open bar—all in a memorable 60-minute adventure.

tours.name: Amsterdam Light Festival Canal Cruise -  Mulled Wine Included!
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals on a cozy boat, enjoying stunning light artworks, unlimited mulled wine, hot chocolate, and engaging audio guides—an enchanting winter experience you won't forget.

tours.name: Private Boat Magical Light Festival Canal Cruise - All Drinks Included
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s enchanting lights on a cozy boat, sipping mulled wine, hot chocolate, or wine. Enjoy live art tours, warm blankets, and unforgettable views—perfect for family, friends, or colleagues.

tours.name: Light Festival Canal Cruise -  Fully Open Boat with Mulled wine
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals, passing 20 dazzling light displays. Sip warm Glühwein on a cozy open boat while the captain shares stories behind the art—an unforgettable winter adventure on the water.

tours.name: Amsterdam Private Tours
tours.description: Create your perfect Amsterdam adventure with a private bike, food, or walking tour. Explore canals, neighborhoods, windmills, or hidden eateries at your pace—no groups, just personalized discovery.

tours.name: Private cruise on the Pien
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s hidden canals on a 90-minute all-inclusive cruise, enjoying local stories, a full open bar, and tasty snacks—all away from the crowds for a true city secret.

tours.name: ✈️ Private Schiphol Layover Food Tour
tours.description: Turn your Schiphol layover into a personal Amsterdam adventure with local bites, hidden canals, and stories. Enjoy 3-4 hours of private sightseeing, tastings, and culture—then be back at your gate on time.

tours.name: Private Dutch Cooking Class in Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a private 4-hour Dutch cooking class in Amsterdam, where a local chef guides you to create a personalized 3-course meal. Enjoy hands-on fun, local stories, drinks, and a delicious sit-down feast in a cozy setting.

tours.name: Luxury Cocktail Cruise | Departure Red Light District (Groupon)
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before on a luxurious Cocktail Cruise! Enjoy an hour of stunning canal views while sipping unlimited cocktails, including the unique Damrak Gin & Tonic. With a knowledgeable crew sharing fascinating stories and a fully stocked bar, this cruise promises a delightful blend of relaxation and entertainment.

tours.name: Torture Museum Entry + Photo Booth Experience
tours.description: Discover the chilling history of punishment at Amsterdam's Torture Museum, where over 40 medieval instruments reveal the dark past of justice. Explore the haunting exhibits, including the Inquisitiestoel and Guillotine, enhanced by historical insights in eight languages. This unique experience blends a painful legacy with modern technology through an AI photo booth souvenir.

tours.name: Van Gogh at the Kröller-Müller Museum & medieval Elburg city
tours.description: Explore masterpieces at the Kröller-Müller Museum, cruise scenic Dutch countryside, and stroll through Elburg’s medieval streets—all in a personalized, full-day adventure with a private guide and chauffeur.

tours.name: Around Jordaan
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s serene Jordaan canals, passing the Anne Frank House and Wester Tower. A one-hour kayak adventure filled with local stories, perfect for water-savvy explorers seeking a unique city view.

tours.name: Discover the city of Rembrandt
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through 17th-century Amsterdam, exploring the life of the legendary painter Rembrandt van Rijn. Visit key sites tied to his artistry, enjoy immersive multimedia experiences, and conclude at his historic home, where masterpieces were born. Discover the city through the eyes of a true artistic genius.

tours.name: The Golden Age of Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a captivating three-hour guided tour through Amsterdam's rich history, from its medieval roots to the Golden Age's expansion. Discover iconic landmarks and hidden gems while learning about the East India Company's impact on the city, all led by an expert in local and WWII history.

tours.name: A full day in Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local on this personalized tour, where you can explore the city's rich history, vibrant culture, and unique stories. Choose your interests, from museums to shopping, and gain insights from an expert guide in local and WW2 history. Discover the unforgettable charm of this iconic city.

tours.name: Happy High Tour
tours.description: Join a relaxed, 420-friendly boat tour with stunning views, where like-minded adults unwind, enjoy herbal tobacco options, and share a chill vibe—no loud partying, just simple, fun, stress-free moments.

tours.name: Half-Day Private Tour to Windmills, Cheese & Waterland Charm
tours.description: Explore Holland’s highlights in a private 4-hour tour: windmills at Zaanse Schans, cheese tasting at Simonehoeve, and charming Waterland villages—all with luxury transport and expert insights, avoiding crowds.

tours.name: Countryside and Windmills Tour • 5 Hours
tours.description: Explore the Dutch countryside with windmills, cheese farms, fishing villages, and traditional crafts. Enjoy a private, comfortable tour with tastings, scenic views, and free time at charming harbors—an unforgettable Dutch experience.

tours.name: Private Amsterdam Countryside Tour
tours.description: Explore the scenic Dutch countryside outside Amsterdam on a private, all-inclusive 5-hour tour. Capture stunning landscapes, enjoy hassle-free travel, and immerse yourself in the beauty of the countryside.

tours.name: Comedy & Clubbing (Adana Twins) - Het Sieraad September 21
tours.description: Experience an unforgettable night at Het Sieraad, where laughter meets rhythm! Enjoy side-splitting English stand-up comedy from top comedians, followed by an electrifying club night featuring renowned DJs. This unique blend of humor and dance promises non-stop entertainment, making it a must-attend event for those seeking a memorable evening!

tours.name: Ritz - a classic luxury saloon boat from 1915
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam's canals aboard a classic 1915 saloon boat. With a knowledgeable captain as your guide, enjoy a welcome drink and the option for more from the onboard minibar. This luxurious, heated vessel accommodates up to 12 guests, ensuring a memorable cruise in any weather.

tours.name: Family Friendly Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (ENGLISH)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2.5-hour private tour of the Van Gogh Museum, where an expert guide brings the artist's vibrant life and works to light. Discover iconic masterpieces like Sunflowers and The Bedroom, while engaging storytelling makes Van Gogh's journey accessible and exciting for families, leaving you inspired and enriched.

tours.name: Amsterdam private tour Off the beaten path
tours.description: Explore Holland’s hidden treasures on this private day tour, visiting ancient towns, vast reclaimed lands, and Europe's largest freshwater lake. Wander through secret windmills, picturesque harbors, and learn how Dutch ingenuity shaped the country’s water management and agriculture. Discover the Netherlands beyond the crowds in an unforgettable, off-the-beaten-path adventure.

tours.name: Private Tour
tours.description: Experience the ultimate private boat tour, fully customizable to suit your desires. Craft your own itinerary, select catering options, and choose the tour duration. Perfect for romantic evenings, family adventures, or distinctive corporate events, this unique experience promises unforgettable memories tailored just for you.

tours.name: Classic Canal Tour
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s historic canals, passing the Seven Bridges, Amstel River, and old port. Enjoy a relaxed two-hour paddle with expert guides, soaking in city views from a fresh, water-level perspective.

tours.name: Amsterdam Private Walking Tour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s secrets on a private tour: from historic Dam Square and the vibrant Red Light District to hidden courtyards, UNESCO canals, and charming Jordaan. Dive into stories, architecture, and local culture at your own pace.

tours.name: Private Food Tour in Amsterdam
tours.description: Savor Amsterdam’s flavors with a private tour through De Pijp: crispy bitterballen, exotic Surinamese dishes, warm stroopwafels, local beers, and a lively market. A delicious journey into the city’s multicultural food scene.

tours.name: Day-trip Tour from Amsterdam to Rotterdam to The Hague and Delft
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable journey through the Netherlands, exploring Rotterdam’s striking architecture, The Hague’s royal landmarks, and Delft’s exquisite pottery. This tour offers a unique blend of modern marvels and historical treasures, making it a captivating experience that showcases the country’s rich cultural tapestry in just one day.

tours.name: Private Tour from Amsterdam to Rotterdam to The Hague and Delft
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through the Netherlands, exploring Rotterdam's striking architecture, The Hague's royal heritage, and Delft's exquisite pottery. This unique tour blends modern marvels with historical treasures, offering a rich cultural experience in just one day. Discover the essence of the Netherlands in an unforgettable adventure.

tours.name: Small group canal cruise incl. drinks and Dutch snacks
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s iconic canals on a cozy, eco-friendly boat with local guides. Enjoy stunning sights, a snack stop, and insider stories in a relaxed 2-hour cruise past landmarks like Anne Frank House and the Skinny Bridge.

tours.name: Bubble Football Amsterdam
tours.description: Jump into a lively bubble soccer match next to Amsterdam Sloterdijk Station! Bump, bounce, and laugh on an outdoor pitch for an hour, with bubbles, gear, and optional photo and video packages to capture the fun.

tours.name: BBQ at the Park
tours.description: Enjoy a hassle-free 2-hour BBQ in Westerpark, Amsterdam. Our chef grills delicious meats, and we provide drinks, plates, and blankets—just relax and savor the outdoor feast without lifting a finger.

tours.name: Royal Engagement Experience
tours.description: Embark on a unique two-hour journey to create your perfect engagement ring. Enjoy a private consultation with a diamond expert, sip complimentary champagne, and explore various styles. Experience on-site diamond setting, ensuring your love story is captured in a ring as special as your bond.

tours.name: Diamond Masterclass
tours.description: Experience the art of diamond polishing in an exclusive 4-hour workshop for just two participants. Enjoy a private tour of the Diamond Museum, learn the craft from a master polisher, and create your own diamond to take home. Complete your journey with a unique jewelry setting opportunity and a polishing certificate.

tours.name: Amsterdam Walking Tour: WWII, Liberal Culture & Waterways
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s hidden stories with passionate guide Antonis, exploring secret streets, WWII history, and quirky sights. Enjoy coffee, surprises, and a VR visit to the Anne Frank House—an immersive, heartfelt journey.

tours.name: Rondje Mokum
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s hidden gems, cozy pubs, and historic canals on a lively 3.5-hour walk. Enjoy local stories, authentic spots, and a drink or two, all led by a friendly guide in a small, intimate group.

tours.name: The Green City: From Golden Age to Sustainable Future (Small Group)
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s water mastery and green future on a lively, eco-focused walk. Visualize history with chalk and iPads, explore hidden gems, and see how resilience shaped this vibrant, sustainable city.

tours.name: Upcycling workshop – Jeans side panel (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Transform old jeans into stylish new pieces in just three hours! No experience needed—our designers guide you through sewing and upcycling, adding personalized panels for a unique, eco-friendly wardrobe upgrade.

tours.name: The 0.0 % non-alcohol Beer Bike Experience Amsterdam
tours.description: Hop on a 90-minute Amsterdam beer and prosecco bike tour with stunning city views, 20 liters of non-alcoholic beer, lively music, and a friendly guide. Perfect for groups up to 16 per bike—fun, social, and unforgettable.

tours.name: Self-guided bike tour Amsterdam Center
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s scenic streets with a safe, easy GPS route that highlights top sights and hidden gems. Enjoy expert audio guides, photos, and videos as you explore landmarks at your own pace—stress-free and unforgettable.

tours.name: Deep Dive Amsterdam
tours.description: Dive beneath Amsterdam’s surface with a full-day private tour exploring hidden courtyards, art, local bites, and secret spots. Immerse yourself in the city’s layered history, vibrant neighborhoods, and rich food culture.

tours.name: Amsterdam Striptease Dinner
tours.description: Savor a three-course meal in a stylish city restaurant, topped with an exclusive VIP strip show just for your group. Enjoy private dining and attentive service in a memorable, evening entertainment experience.

tours.name: Beer Bike Amsterdam
tours.description: Cycle through the city on a lively beer bike, pedaling and sipping as you enjoy included drinks, a friendly guide, and weather protection—perfect for fun, fitness, and friends all in one ride.

tours.name: Steak & Strip Dinner Amsterdam
tours.description: Savor a three-course steak feast with premium cuts and delicious sides, then unwind with an exclusive private striptease in your VIP area, blending gourmet dining with adult entertainment for a night to remember.

tours.name: All-In Boat Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s famous canals on a private boat, sipping unlimited drinks for 1.5 hours. Relax and soak in the city’s beauty in style on this laid-back, unforgettable cruise.

tours.name: Archery Tag Battle Amsterdam
tours.description: Jump into 1.5 hours of outdoor Archery Tag, dodging barricades and firing foam arrows at rivals. Gear up with masks, team challenges, and expert tips for a fun, safe, paintball-free combat experience.

tours.name: Amsterdam Target Shooting Experience
tours.description: Test your skills in a safe indoor range with expert guidance, firing .22 and .38 pistols. Feel the thrill of real recoil as you sharpen your aim in a focused, one-hour session.

tours.name: Footgolf Amsterdam
tours.description: Kick a football into giant holes on scenic footgolf courses, rent turf shoes, and relax with drinks and snacks. Enjoy 1.5 hours of fun, fresh air, and friendly competition in beautiful parkland.

tours.name: Bullets, Babes & Beer

tours.name: Target Shooting & All-In Boat Cruise

tours.name: Fire Breathing Workshop
tours.description: Master the art of fire-breathing in just one hour. Practice with water, then ignite your own fiery stunt outdoors under expert supervision—safely and confidently.

tours.name: Italian Pizza Boat Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s canals for 1.5 hours with unlimited pizza and drinks. A private captain guides you past iconic sights as you indulge in fresh pizza and sip beer, wine, or soft drinks in a relaxing cruise.

tours.name: BBQ Boat Cruise
tours.description: Sail along scenic canals on a private 1.5-hour tour, then indulge in a mouthwatering onboard BBQ feast with grilled meats, fresh sides, and chilled drinks—perfect for relaxing group gatherings by the water.

tours.name: Amsterdam Whiskey Tasting

tours.name: Amsterdam Limousine Striptease

tours.name: Amsterdam Limo Service
tours.description: Celebrate your bachelor party in style with luxury limos, from sleek stretchs to massive Hummers. Enjoy VIP treatment, drinks, music, and a smooth ride to Amsterdam’s hottest spots. Relax and toast to the night.

tours.description: Savor authentic Dutch flavors on an intimate walking tour through Amsterdam’s hidden neighborhoods, tasting cheeses, stroopwafels, oysters, and local spirits while uncovering stories and secret spots away from tourists.

tours.name: Grand Masters Museum Tour and Stroll
tours.description: Skip the lines and dive into the Dutch Golden Age with a private Rijksmuseum tour. See masterpieces like The Night Watch, explore hidden stories, and understand the complex history behind the art—all with an expert guide.

tours.description: Dive into a 6-hour party in the Red Light District with free shots at each bar and VIP access at the final club—skip lines and keep the energy high on this unforgettable pub crawl.

tours.description: Visit Brussels in style with a private minivan, explore iconic sites like the Atomium and Grand-Place, enjoy local chocolates and beers, and have free time to soak in the city’s rich history and architecture—all in a 10-hour trip from Amsterdam.

tours.name: Brussels City Tour • 12 Hours
tours.description: Explore Brussels in 12 hours with a comfortable private minivan, visiting iconic sites like the Atomium, Grand-Place, Manneken-Pis, and enjoying Belgian chocolates and beers. Add a guided tour or visit Antwerp on the way back.

tours.name: Theme Parks • 8 Hours
tours.description: Explore Efteling’s magical rides, enchanting shows, and daring attractions in a beautiful natural setting. Enjoy a private, comfortable transfer from Amsterdam for a fun-filled day for all ages.

tours.name: Private Tulip Fields of Holland Tour
tours.description: See vibrant tulip, daffodil, and hyacinth fields in full bloom during a private 4.5-hour tour. Travel scenic rural roads, snap photos, hear stories, and enjoy a seaside lunch before returning through colorful flower fields.

tours.name: BB - Three Hour Bike Rental
tours.description: Experience the joy of cycling with MacBike! Rent top-quality city bikes for three hours, perfect for families and adventurers alike. Enjoy the peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With convenient pick-up locations and a wide selection, your unforgettable ride awaits in the heart of the city.

tours.name: BB - Full Day Bike Rental
tours.description: Experience the thrill of exploring the city on a top-quality bike from MacBike! With a wide selection for the whole family, complimentary locks, and no damage fees, your adventure is worry-free. Conveniently located and open daily, MacBike ensures you have the perfect ride for a memorable day out.

tours.name: Tour Bairro De Pijp
tours.description: Explore the vibrant De Pijp neighborhood, a historic area transformed from a working-class hub to Amsterdam's artistic heart. Stroll through Sarphatipark and visit the bustling Albert Cuyp Market, immersing yourself in the rich culture and daily life of the Dutch. Discover the beauty and stories that make De Pijp unforgettable.

tours.name: Company or Private Group Indonesian Cooking Class
tours.description: Join a fun 3.5-hour Indonesian cooking class in Amsterdam, where you make and enjoy a flavorful rice table, learn about authentic ingredients, and share a relaxed dinner with friends or colleagues.

tours.name: Company or Private Group Thai Cooking Class
tours.description: Join a fun 3.5-hour Thai cooking class with friends or colleagues, where you make authentic dishes, learn about ingredients, enjoy a delicious dinner, and share recipes in a relaxed setting. Perfect for team building.

tours.name: Company or Private Group Vietnamese Cooking Class
tours.description: Join a lively 3.5-hour Vietnamese cooking class with friends or colleagues. Prepare and enjoy authentic dishes tailored to your dietary needs, then relax with dinner and drinks in a cozy setting.

tours.name: Company or Private Group Korean Cooking Class
tours.description: Join a fun 3.5-hour Korean cooking class, make dishes like Kimchi and Bulgogi, then enjoy a personalized dinner with friends or colleagues in a cozy setting—perfect for team building and group outings.

tours.name: Company or Private Group Japanese Cooking Class
tours.description: Join a fun 3.5-hour Japanese cooking class with friends or colleagues. Make sushi and sashimi tailored to your diet, cook together under expert guidance, then enjoy your homemade meal in a cozy setting.

tours.name: Zaanse Schaans Tour
tours.description: Travel from Amsterdam to Zaanse Schans in comfort, then wander cobblestone streets lined with windmills, wooden houses, and artisanal crafts. Savor Dutch cheese and chocolate while uncovering centuries of rich heritage.

tours.name: What Happens in Amsterdam Stays in Amsterdam Tour
tours.description: Customize your wild Amsterdam adventure with private strip shows, cocktail workshops, Kama Sutra classes, canal cruises, and more—tailored to your group’s vibe. Just tell us who you are, and we’ll plan the rest.

tours.name: The Famous Boom Chicago Comedy Show
tours.description: Laugh out loud at Boom Chicago in Amsterdam, where lightning-fast improv, sharp wit, and live music create a high-energy show. Join locals and stars-in-the-making for a night of unforgettable comedy and fun.

tours.name: Share a bike
tours.description: Join a lively 90-minute shared party bike tour, pedaling through town with drinks, new friends, and fun guides. Sip beer or prosecco, chat, and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere on this unforgettable social ride.

tours.name: Amsterdam private tour to windmills, cheese farm and villages
tours.description: Experience the charm of the Dutch countryside on a private 7-hour tour, where you'll escape the hustle of Amsterdam. Discover iconic windmills, savor local cheese, and learn about Dutch traditions from passionate guides. This immersive journey promises a unique glimpse into Holland's rich culture and picturesque landscapes.

tours.name: Romantisch diner
tours.description: Sail through historic canals on the elegant Elisabeth boat, enjoying a 2.5-hour cruise with two stops for a fresh, three-course gourmet dinner served in style. An unforgettable blend of luxury and scenery.

tours.name: Babyshower High tea
tours.description: Celebrate a special day with a 1.75-hour high tea cruise in Amsterdam, sailing past Central Station. Enjoy flowers, great service, and a festive atmosphere with friends or family.

tours.name: Wijnproeverij - The Wine Guy
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s waters on a private 2-hour cruise while tasting four exquisite wines. Learn about different grape varieties and regions—perfect for friends, family, or colleagues.

tours.name: Private Dinner Cruise 3 courses
tours.description: Embark on a memorable 3-hour dinner cruise through Amsterdam's picturesque canals aboard a luxury saloon boat. Savor a delectable three-course meal from a local restaurant while enjoying stunning waterway views. With options for indoor and outdoor seating, this unique experience promises an unforgettable evening of fine dining and scenic beauty.

tours.name: Private Dinner Cruise 2 courses
tours.description: Experience a memorable 2.5-hour dinner cruise on Amsterdam's picturesque canals aboard a luxury saloon boat. Savor a two-course meal from a local restaurant while enjoying breathtaking views. With options for indoor and outdoor seating, this intimate cruise accommodates small groups, making it a perfect evening getaway.

tours.name: Privé kleine fietstour met lunch
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s historic canals, admire 17th-century houses, visit Vondelpark, and see landmarks like the Anne Frank House and Rijksmuseum. Perfect for a scenic winter or autumn adventure.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop: Tied Top (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Craft your perfect summer top in just three hours! Learn sewing and serging skills, choose from vibrant fabrics, and create a stylish, custom-fit piece—no experience needed.

tours.name: FREE Anna Frank
tours.description: Unisciti a un tour che svela la storia di Anne Frank, partendo dal quartiere ebraico e arrivando davanti alla sua casa. Scopri perché si nascose e rivivi il suo mondo attraverso un percorso ricco di emozioni e storia.

tours.name: Holland Countryside Tour
tours.description: Escape the city for a private Dutch countryside adventure: tour a hidden windmill, meet farmers, sample cheeses, explore charming villages, and enjoy scenic views—an authentic, crowd-free experience you’ll never forget.

tours.name: Up-cycle workshop: Denim Hobo Bag
tours.description: Transform old jeans into a stylish, fully lined hobo bag in just 3 hours. Perfect for beginners, learn sewing skills while creating a unique accessory from upcycled denim.

tours.name: Private Morning Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s peaceful canals on a private boat, watching the city wake up in serene morning light. Perfect for groups, with optional snacks and drinks to start your day right.

tours.name: Amsterdam: Legendary Red Light District Tour & Pub Crawl
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s secret charms with a local guide, visiting lively bars, enjoying free shots, and exploring historic alleys and neon-lit windows of the Red Light District. Dive into culture, nightlife, and hidden stories in 2 hours.

tours.name: Upcycling Lesson: Shirring Technique (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Transform old clothes in just one hour with creative shirring at our Sewing Café. Personalize your t-shirts, skirts, or shirts and give them a fresh, unique look—perfect for beginners eager to upcycle with style.

tours.name: Cheese Fondue Cruise
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals on a private boat, indulging in warm, melty cheese fondue paired with wine. Enjoy stunning views, fresh bread, and pickles as the city’s golden architecture glows around you.

tours.name: The Floating Café
tours.description: Cruise Amsterdam’s historic sloop, The Ivan Frank, and enjoy stunning canal views, tasty homemade snacks, and warm hospitality. Glide past iconic landmarks and hidden gems on this cozy, floating café adventure.

tours.name: Pizza and Drinks Bike Amsterdam
tours.description: Hop on a lively bike tour through Amsterdam with cold beer, prosecco, and pizza. Enjoy 75 minutes of sightseeing, music, and fun, with breaks to relax and refuel. Perfect for parties and memorable adventures.

tours.name: Private Karaoke Bike Utrecht
tours.description: Sing your heart out on Utrecht’s private Karaoke Bike, cruising for 75 minutes with drinks, lively music, and fun games. Perfect for birthdays or parties—turn the city into your personal stage and create unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum... Better With A Licensed Guide!
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour private tour of the Rijksmuseum, guided by an expert who reveals the hidden gems of the Dutch Golden Age. Delve into the rich history, vibrant symbols, and daily life of the past, making this an unforgettable exploration of art and culture.

tours.name: Free Guided Diamond Factory Group Tour
tours.description: Experience the allure of diamonds with a guided tour at Royal Coster Diamonds, the world's oldest diamond polishing factory in Amsterdam. Witness master craftsmen at work, explore the largest collection of unset diamonds outside Antwerp, and enjoy tax-free shopping. This unique opportunity offers a glimpse into the enchanting world of diamonds.

tours.name: Private Boat Magical Light Festival Canal Cruise -  Mulled Wine
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals to see stunning light art during the festival’s “Loading” theme. Enjoy unlimited hot drinks, gluhwein, and expert commentary while cozying up on heated boats—an unforgettable winter experience.

tours.name: Plastic Fishing - Basisscholen Amsterdam
tours.description: Kids fish plastic from Amsterdam’s canals in colorful boats, learning how their actions help the environment. Fun teamwork, hands-on cleanup, and a positive message make this a memorable, impactful adventure.

tours.name: Private Van Gogh Museum Private Tour (Hotel)
tours.description: Explore Van Gogh’s life and masterpieces on a private 2-hour tour. Dive into his story, see Sunflowers and Potato Eaters, and uncover what made him a post-impressionist legend—without the long lines.

tours.name: Private Rijksmuseum Tour (Hotel)
tours.description: Enjoy a personalized 2-hour private tour of the Rijksmuseum, exploring Dutch masterpieces like Rembrandt’s Nachtwacht, learning their stories, history, and techniques, all while soaking in the stunning building and vibrant art scene.

tours.name: Day Tour to Antwerp and Ghent from Amsterdam
tours.description: Journey through Belgium’s rich history and vibrant culture in a day. Marvel at Ghent’s medieval castle and Gothic cathedral, then explore Antwerp’s stunning Renaissance square, iconic cathedral, and bustling Diamond District. Relax with scenic canal views or a boat ride, immersing yourself in two captivating cities full of art, architecture, and legends.

tours.name: Bring Your Own Drinks Bike Amsterdam
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam for 75 minutes on a comfy bike, bring your own drinks, enjoy lively sightseeing, music, and social fun with friends—an unforgettable, customizable adventure you won’t find anywhere else.

tours.name: Tickets Amsterdam Light festival
tours.description: Experience the enchanting Amsterdam Light Festival from the comfort of a fully electric sloop. Sip mulled wine or hot chocolate as you glide silently through the canals, guided by an enthusiastic captain sharing stories behind stunning artworks. This unique cruise combines art, culture, and relaxation for an unforgettable evening.

tours.name: Private boat tour in Amsterdam
tours.description: Enjoy a private, eco-friendly canal cruise in Amsterdam with personalized stories, luxurious comfort, and stunning views of historic architecture. Perfect for intimate moments, photos, and relaxed exploration.

tours.name: Private Cruise - Amsterdam Light Festival
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals on a cozy, private boat, soaking in stunning light art and stories behind “Legacy,” all while enjoying blankets, drinks, and live commentary in this magical 75-minute cruise.

tours.name: Privé Fietstour Amsterdam Highlights
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s highlights in 2 relaxing hours, from Jordaan to Vondelpark and the grachtengordel. Enjoy stories about the city’s history, pass the narrowest house, and cross the iconic Magere Brug.

tours.name: Pedal to the Petals 7.5 hours
tours.description: Cycle effortlessly through vibrant tulip fields and charming villages on an electric bike tour from Amsterdam. Visit a flower farm, enjoy a local lunch, and explore Keukenhof’s stunning blooms—an unforgettable spring adventure.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Tote Bag (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your first tote bag in 3 hours with expert guidance, organic materials, and hands-on sewing skills. Perfect for beginners, you'll leave with a finished project and new confidence in sewing.

tours.name: Private Anne Frank & WWII Tour
tours.description: Walk through Amsterdam’s Jewish Quarter and uncover stories of courage, resistance, and survival during WWII. Led by a local expert, this 2-hour outdoor tour ends outside the Anne Frank House, leaving you with lasting insights and questions.

tours.name: Amsterdam Discount Bike
tours.description: Pedal through Amsterdam’s harbor on a 1-hour semi-assisted bike tour, enjoying ice-cold beer or prosecco, lively tunes, and local stories. Perfect for groups, with all drinks included—an unforgettable, fun-filled adventure.

tours.name: Bike tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam from a local's perspective on a guided bike tour through its enchanting streets and canals. Pedal past iconic landmarks, vibrant neighborhoods, and serene parks, uncovering hidden gems and rich history. This unique experience blends urban exploration with the tranquility of nature, making it an unforgettable adventure in one of the world's most bike-friendly cities.

tours.name: Food tour
tours.description: Embark on a delightful Dutch food tour that tantalizes your taste buds with local specialties like stroopwafels, herring, and cheeses. Explore charming neighborhoods while your expert guide shares the rich history and culture behind each dish, making this culinary journey a memorable experience filled with authentic flavors and hidden gems.

tours.name: Challenger – 80min Luxury Smoke and Lounge Tour
tours.description: Join a relaxed 80-minute boat tour on a heated, rainproof vessel. Enjoy a chill vibe with like-minded people, lighthearted fun, and scenic views—bring your own supplies and celebrate life stress-free.

tours.name: Private Amsterdam Virtual Tours
tours.description: Experience a unique live-streamed walking tour of Amsterdam with Mark or Lee, where you’ll explore the old town and hear captivating stories. Enjoy a personalized private tour with friends, interact in real-time, and capture memorable moments. Flexible scheduling ensures a convenient experience tailored just for you and your group.

tours.name: Company Fishing Amsterdam
tours.description: Join us for plastic fishing in Amsterdam’s canals—an eco-adventure loved by over 450 companies. Sail a private boat, learn about plastic pollution, and compete for prizes in this fun, eco-friendly activity year-round.

tours.name: Bill's Expat Bike Tour Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam like a local on a safe, 3-hour bike tour outside the busy center. See hidden neighborhoods, street art, a windmill, and sample chocolates, all while learning Dutch culture from your friendly guide Bill.

tours.name: Vermeer’s Delft, The Mauritshuis and Rembrandt’s Leiden city
tours.description: Experience the artistic legacy of the Dutch masters on a captivating tour through Delft and The Hague. Stroll cobblestone streets, explore the Mauritshuis Museum's masterpieces, and discover the rich history of Rembrandt and Vermeer. This immersive journey combines art, culture, and picturesque scenery for an unforgettable day.

tours.name: Privé Misdaad- en Biertour
tours.description: Cycle and walk through Amsterdam’s rich history, from lively cafés to the oldest neighborhoods. Enjoy stories of beer, crime, and romance, plus a drink at a famous local pub—an exciting 2.5-hour adventure.

tours.name: Private Group Walking Tour
tours.description: Design your perfect Dutch adventure—stroll charming neighborhoods, explore historic sites, or dive into Amsterdam’s vibrant coffee and red-light districts. Tell us your dream tour, and we’ll make it happen.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans & Giethoorn Private Tour
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable 8-hour guided tour through the enchanting Dutch countryside, exploring the historic windmills of Zaanse Schans and the serene canals of Giethoorn. Experience traditional cheese-making, enjoy a canal cruise, and savor a delightful Dutch lunch, all while immersing yourself in the unique charm of these captivating destinations.

tours.name: Holland Vintage Private Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 10-hour Holland Vintage Private Tour, exploring the charm of Zaanse Schans, Edam, and Volendam. Experience picturesque windmills, savor local cheeses, and enjoy a scenic Amsterdam canal cruise. This immersive journey reveals the rich culture and traditions of the Netherlands, making it a truly unforgettable adventure.

tours.name: Customized Private Tour – Europe (Call to book)
tours.description: Experience the ultimate adventure with our Customized Private Tour package, designed just for you! Enjoy personalized itineraries that reflect your interests, from historical sites to local cuisine. With expert planning and 24/7 support, your dream destination is within reach, offering flexibility and convenience for an unforgettable journey.

tours.name: Dutch Golden Age Tour
tours.description: Journey through the Dutch Golden Age with windmills, traditional houses, cheese tasting, fresh seafood, and a scenic canal cruise—an unforgettable 7-hour adventure into the heart of the Netherlands.

tours.name: Flower Bike Rental
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam like never before with a flower bike rental. Ride beautifully decorated bikes through picturesque canals and historic architecture, capturing unforgettable moments. Feel the floral breeze as you explore solo or with a partner, creating cherished memories against the city's enchanting backdrop. Book your adventure today!

tours.name: Exclusive Brunch Cruise
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals on a restored boat, savoring a gourmet grazing platter with pastries, eggs, smoked salmon, and Belgian waffles. Perfect for groups, with stunning views and a delicious brunch experience.

tours.name: Flower Boat (Starboard Dock)
tours.description: Enjoy a thrilling one-hour adventure with English narration, perfect for all ages. Experience the excitement for just €24.50 adults or €19.50 children, with special Saturday rates.

tours.name: Excursão aos moinhos de vento e cidade do Lego
tours.description: Embark on an enchanting 8-hour tour to Zaanse Schans, where iconic windmills, traditional Dutch cheese, and wooden clogs come to life. Explore the charming Lego city of Zaandam and savor a delicious Dutch pancake for lunch. Experience captivating demonstrations and tastings that celebrate the rich heritage of the Netherlands.

tours.name: Spectacular Evening Cruise (18+) - Departure Herengracht 128 on boat Stan Huygens
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s enchanting canals at sunset, savor local cheeses, and enjoy seasonal craft beers and wines in a relaxed, intimate setting. Perfect for unwinding and connecting in style.

tours.name: Red Light District Tour 1.5hr
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s hidden history on a night walk through the Red Light District, exploring centuries of sex work, vibrant neighborhoods, and stories of dignity, culture, and change from a former dominatrix’s unique perspective.

tours.name: Red Light District Primetime Private Tour (18+)
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam's Red Light District like never before on a private nighttime tour. Guided by an expert, explore its iconic sights and hidden stories while soaking in the illuminated canals and historic architecture. This customizable journey reveals the area's rich history and vibrant culture, making it a truly unforgettable adventure.

tours.name: Private Canal Boat Tour
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s UNESCO canals in your own private, elegant boat. Enjoy personalized routes, expert guides, and seamless service—perfect for special moments, celebrations, or simply discovering the city in style.

tours.name: Quartiere Jordaan, Anna Frank (esterno) e zona dei canali
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam beyond the crowds with a 2-hour tour through Jordaan’s hidden canals, historic houses, and quiet alleys. Discover local secrets, charming bridges, and authentic life away from tourist spots.

tours.name: Explorer Tour
tours.description: Paddle through Amsterdam’s waterways, visiting iconic sights and hidden gems. Feel the breeze, see stunning views, and enjoy a memorable 3-hour adventure off the beaten path with expert guides.

tours.name: Flaneur Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable Walking Tour through Amsterdam's historic streets, where you'll uncover hidden gems and hear captivating stories about the city's vibrant culture and architecture. This unique experience, led by an expert guide, invites you to explore both iconic landmarks and lesser-known treasures, making it a must-do for any visitor.

tours.name: Red Light District – Its history and its future
tours.description: Discover the hidden gems of Amsterdam's Red Light District and Chinatown on the Red Light Revels tour. This unique adventure offers cultural immersion, exclusive access to private sites, and engaging storytelling from knowledgeable guides, providing an unforgettable experience that delves into the rich histories and vibrant traditions of these iconic neighborhoods.

tours.name: Marriage Proposal in Amsterdam - Private Romantic Boat Cruise
tours.description: Propose on a romantic, private Amsterdam canal cruise in a stylish saloon boat with cozy lighting, champagne, roses, and personalized touches. Create unforgettable memories in a serene, elegant setting perfect for saying "Yes."

tours.name: Schilder je eigen tegel! (Amsterdam)
tours.description: Join a unique workshop in Amsterdam where you can create your own tile while enjoying a warm cup of coffee or tea. With a small group setting, you'll receive a brief introduction before diving into hands-on creativity. Reserve your spot for an unforgettable artistic experience!

tours.name: Diamond & Champagne Tour
tours.description: Sip champagne, spot a hidden diamond, and watch a expert reveal the winner in this sparkling tour. Celebrate with a special cocktail and leave with a chance to win a real diamond—an unforgettable, glittering experience.

tours.name: Entree Tickets
tours.description: Jump into an hour of adrenaline-pumping VR adventures: zombie battles, racing, flying, escape games, and more—immerse yourself in a world of action and fun, all in one unforgettable session.

tours.name: Schilder je eigen tegel! (Delft)
tours.description: Join a unique workshop at Heinen Delfts Blauw, where you’ll enjoy coffee or tea while learning to create your own tile. With a small group of up to 12 participants, this hands-on experience allows you to unleash your creativity in a charming setting. Perfect for a memorable afternoon!

tours.name: Lunch bij de Brakke Grond
tours.description: Enjoy a lively 1-hour tour combined with a tasty lunch at De Brakke Grond, a vibrant cultural hub where Flemish spirit and local art blend. Savor two sandwiches and fresh juice in a cozy, artistic atmosphere.

tours.name: Private tour / Zaanse Schans, Volendam, Giethoorn
tours.description: Embark on a unique full-day countryside adventure with EcoEcho Tours, blending tradition and technology. Explore the charming village of Volendam, cross a historic dike with a captivating VR experience, and glide through the enchanting canals of Giethoorn. Enjoy personal stories, local snacks, and genuine connections in a small group setting.

tours.name: Flaneur Food Tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam's vibrant culinary scene on our Walking Food Tour! This immersive experience blends city exploration with delightful tastings of local delicacies at top spots. Enjoy a rich mix of history, culture, and flavors, making it a memorable way to savor the city like a true local.

tours.name: The Beer Bike Experience Utrecht
tours.description: Hop on our Utrecht Beer and Prosecco Bike Tour for 75 minutes of sightseeing, music, and social fun. Sip unlimited drinks from a 20-liter tap, enjoy lively tunes, and take in the city’s sights with friends in a relaxed, unforgettable ride.

tours.name: Proseccobike tour Utrecht
tours.description: Celebrate with friends on a 90-minute Prosecco Bike Tour through Utrecht. Sip bubbly, sing along with your playlist, and enjoy a lively ride with wind protection and a friendly guide—perfect for parties and special occasions.

tours.name: Stroopwafel Workshop
tours.description: Experience the art of making stroopwafels in a cozy Amsterdam studio, just steps from iconic landmarks. This hands-on workshop combines history, creativity, and deliciousness as you mix, bake, and decorate your own treats. Enjoy your creations on-site or take them home, and leave with a personalized certificate to commemorate your culinary adventure!

tours.name: BL PLATFORM TEST 1
tours.description: Set sail on a relaxing drift as ships depart into the sunset, sharing cheers and last stories. Choose the 2-hour cruise for a quick farewell or extend to 3 hours for more laughter and memories. Enjoy snacks and drinks before heading out on the water, soaking in the final moments of the voyage.

tours.name: Full-Day Amsterdam Food & Drink Tour With a Private Guide
tours.description: Taste Amsterdam in a day with 10+ local bites and drinks, from cheese and herring to stroopwafels and jenever. Explore iconic neighborhoods, enjoy personalized routes, and indulge in the city’s rich flavors and stories.

tours.name: Tony’s Chocolonely Choco Cruise Amsterdam
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals on the Mokumboot, uncovering the city’s hidden cacao history. Enjoy a lively tour filled with fascinating stories and a delicious Tony’s Chocolonely tasting.

tours.name: ⚓️ Private Boat Tour ⚓️
tours.description: Enjoy a private 1.5-hour boat cruise through Amsterdam’s iconic canals, with flexible routes, your own drinks, a hookah, and a relaxed, 420-friendly vibe—perfect for friends seeking a fun, personalized water adventure.

tours.name: Tour Escala en Ámsterdam
tours.description: Make the most of your layover in Amsterdam with a guided tour tailored to your schedule. Explore iconic sights like Dam Square, the Museumplein, and the Jordaan neighborhood. Extend your adventure to nearby windmills, charming villages, or the stunning Keukenhof gardens—perfect for turning hours into unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Waterfietsen 1 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of water biking in the scenic Amsterdamse Bos! Perfect for all ages, this unique hour-long adventure allows you to explore the beautiful surroundings while enjoying a fun and active outing. Just bring an ID or driver's license as a deposit for an unforgettable day on the water!

tours.name: Sewing Lesson in the Sewing Café with Guidance - Make your own Project (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own clothes with expert guidance at the Sewing Café. Bring your ideas, use our tools and patterns, and enjoy a cozy spot with coffee and sustainable fabrics. Perfect for all skill levels.

tours.name: Rent a table in the Sewing Café (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Tackle your sewing projects solo in a cozy atelier with top machines, tools, and a fabric store nearby. Enjoy fresh water, cookies, and a coffee corner—perfect for all skill levels, working at your own pace without guidance.

tours.name: Beginner Sewing Course 1.0 (Amsterdam West)
