tours.description: Join our flexible 4-week sewing course to master the basics, create your first tote bag, and craft a skirt, t-shirt, or leggings with expert guidance—perfect for beginners or those refreshing skills.

tours.name: Beginner Sewing Course 2.0 (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Enhance your sewing skills in a flexible 4-week course with expert guidance. Make a stylish blouse or trousers, learn pattern work, and finish a custom garment—all at your own pace in our welcoming Sewing Cafe.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: (Flared) Legging (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own flared leggings in a 3-hour sewing class with organic materials. Learn to cut, sew, and finish stretchy fabrics using an overlock machine, guided by professional fashion designers. No experience needed.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: T-shirt (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own organic T-shirt in 3 hours with expert guidance. Learn to cut, sew, and finish stretchy fabrics, then take home a custom-made shirt—perfect for beginners or those refreshing skills.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Skirt (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own skirt in a fun 4-hour sewing workshop. Choose organic fabrics, learn sewing basics, and leave with a finished circle or wrap skirt, guided by professional fashion designers. No experience needed.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Wrap Top (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own stylish Tied Top in just 3 hours with guidance from fashion pros. Learn sewing basics, work with eco-friendly materials, and leave with a finished garment—perfect for all skill levels.

tours.name: Indoor Bubble Football
tours.description: Jump into a fun-filled bubble football game on indoor turf, with bouncing, bumping, and laughing for an hour. Includes 8 bubbles, gear, and optional photos—perfect for groups 14 and up.

tours.name: Amsterdam Light Festival: Luxury Cocktail Cruise
tours.description: Enjoy Amsterdam’s winter festival from a luxurious electric boat, with stunning 360° views, warm blankets, and free drinks. Relax, listen to live stories, and soak in the mesmerizing lights on this unforgettable 1.5-hour cruise.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Summer Dress - Amsterdam West
tours.description: Create your own stretchy leggings in 3 hours with guidance from fashion designers, using organic fabrics and mastering overlock sewing. Leave with a finished piece and new skills in fabric cutting and finishing.

tours.name: The Gut & Mind Fermentation Workshop: Kimchi and Kefir
tours.description: Create your own probiotic-rich fermented vegetables in a fun, hands-on workshop. Learn the science behind gut health and the mind connection, and take home your personalized jar in this small-group experience.

tours.name: Make use of the Industrial Sewing Machine - West
tours.description: Work on your own sewing projects using top-quality machines and tools in a cozy atelier. Bring your fabrics, enjoy fresh water and cookies, and create at your own pace—perfect for all skill levels, without guidance.

tours.name: Upcycling Project in the Sewing Café with Guidance
tours.description: Transform old clothes into new favorites with expert help. Bring your ideas, use our tools and patterns, and create sustainable, personalized garments in a friendly, fully equipped sewing café.

tours.name: Central Station: A Spanish Latin Cruise; a Spanish welcome to Amsterdam
tours.description: Enjoy a relaxed 90-minute electric boat cruise through Amsterdam’s UNESCO canals. Savor stunning views, lively stories, Dutch treats, and Latin warmth—all in an eco-friendly, open-air setting perfect for friends and family.

tours.name: The Story of Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour journey through Amsterdam's rich 800-year history. Explore the historic center, from the bustling Beurs Square to the intriguing Red Light District and Chinatown. Discover hidden gems, enjoy a coffee break, and learn about the city's cultural evolution, all while strolling along picturesque canals.

tours.name: Company Beach Cleanup Plastic Whale
tours.description: Join a lively 2-hour beach cleanup with colleagues, collecting trash and learning about plastic pollution. Feel the joy of making a real difference while enjoying a fun, team-building outdoor adventure.

tours.name: Canal Cruise with Dutch Pancakes and optional Drinks
tours.description: Sail through UNESCO-listed Amsterdam canals and enjoy stunning views while savoring the city's best freshly made Dutch pancakes. A lively guide shares stories, making this 75-minute cruise unforgettable.

tours.name: Holland Dream Private Tour (Zaanse Schans - Volendam - Giethoorn)
tours.description: Embark on a full-day Holland Dream Private Tour, exploring the enchanting landscapes of Zaanse Schans, Volendam, and Giethoorn. Experience working windmills, savor Dutch herring, and cruise serene canals. With personalized guidance and cultural insights, this journey promises unforgettable memories steeped in Dutch heritage and breathtaking beauty.

tours.name: Holland Wonderful Private Tour (Keukenhof Gardens - Volendam - Zaanse Schans)
tours.description: Experience the enchanting beauty of Holland on a full-day private tour. Explore the vibrant Keukenhof Gardens, the charming Volendam fishing village, and iconic windmills at Zaanse Schans. With a knowledgeable guide and all-inclusive activities, this journey promises unforgettable sights and rich cultural experiences in a single day.

tours.name: Walking Dinner Tour - Private Tour
tours.description: Savor a 4-hour culinary journey with delicious snacks, a full meal, desserts, and four drinks, all tailored to your interests. Enjoy personalized guides, flexible pickup, and a taste of Amsterdam’s vibrant food scene.

tours.name: Dutch Craft Beer & Food Tour - Private Groups
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s highlights in four immersive hours, with flexible private or group options, easy booking, and convenient pickup near Central Station. Uncover the city’s secrets on a personalized tour.

tours.name: Bubble Football & Axe Throwing
tours.description: Unleash your competitive side with an hour of axe throwing and bubble football—perfect for groups seeking fun, laughs, and adrenaline. Ideal for friends, parties, or team outings in Amsterdam.

tours.name: Beginner Sewing Course: Baby Clothes (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create adorable baby clothes in a beginner-friendly workshop. Sew two garments like pants or a bib, guided by a fashion expert, using all materials provided. Perfect for beginners eager to craft lasting keepsakes.

tours.name: Intrepid Expedition through the Redlight District (Spanish Tour)
tours.description: Uncover the fascinating history of Amsterdam’s Redlight District, from medieval roots to its Golden Age rise. Walk through narrow streets, see historic canals, and explore hidden chapels. Hear captivating stories of how commerce, culture, and vice transformed this area into a symbol of progressive attitudes and lively nightlife.

tours.name: Unveiling the Secrets of Amsterdam´s Redlight District.
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s Red Light District secrets, from historic canals and vibrant Zeedijk to the oldest streets and the iconic Oude Kerk. Dive into its rich history, colorful stories, and hidden gems in this immersive tour.

tours.name: Excursão cidade do Lego de Zaandam
tours.description: Explore the picturesque city of Zaandam, known for its Lego charm and Monet's history. This three-hour tour invites you to wander enchanting streets while savoring traditional Dutch delicacies like "Haring" and the famous croquette. Enjoy a guided experience in Portuguese or Spanish, complete with round-trip train tickets from Amsterdam.

tours.name: Privé Anne Frank en Joodse Geschiedenis Tour
tours.description: Step into Amsterdam’s WWII past with a tour through the Jewish quarter, visiting Anne Frank’s former home and hearing gripping stories of resistance and history that shaped the city’s brave legacy.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Tube Top or Skirt (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own stylish tube top or skirt in just 3 hours, learning to sew with stretchy fabrics and a serger. Choose sustainable materials, get expert guidance, and leave with a finished piece in a fun, flexible class.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans Luxury Private Bus Tour + Volendam/Edam (7 guests)
tours.description: Experience the heart of Holland on a luxury private bus tour to Zaanse Schans. Explore iconic windmills, charming wooden houses, and traditional workshops. Enhance your journey with visits to picturesque Volendam and historic Edam, renowned for its cheese. This unforgettable day blends culture, history, and stunning scenery in one remarkable adventure.

tours.name: Upcycle Top Workshop (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Transform jersey scraps into a stylish upcycled top in just three hours. Choose your style, learn serger techniques, and create a unique piece—perfect for confident beginners ready to craft with fabric.

tours.name: Fiets huren op Centraal Station
tours.description: Rent a lightweight, easy-to-handle bike at Amsterdam’s Central Station and explore vibrant neighborhoods, scenic canals, and lively streets—plus hop on the free ferry to discover Noord’s famed eateries.

tours.name: Top 7 sights Amsterdam bike tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s top sights in just 90 minutes, from Vondelpark to lively squares. Enjoy scenic stops, local stories, and iconic landmarks—all on a comfortable bike perfect for quick, fun city adventures.

tours.name: Amsterdam: Anne Frank History Walking Tour
tours.description: Pedal through Amsterdam’s iconic sights in 1.5 hours, from historic Dam Square to scenic canals. Capture photos, hear fascinating stories, and soak up local culture on a lively, intimate bike adventure.

tours.name: Car Smash Amsterdam
tours.description: Unleash your stress by smashing a real car with bats, sledgehammers, or golf clubs. Feel the power, hear the crashes, and enjoy a safe, exhilarating hour of pure destruction in a supervised scrap yard.

tours.name: Company Fishing Rabobank
tours.description: Join a private boat tour and help clean Amsterdam’s canals by fishing out plastic. Compete for prizes, learn about plastic pollution, and enjoy a fun, eco-friendly adventure with your team.

tours.name: Plastic Jagen - Basisscholen, NL
tours.description: Join a lively beach cleanup to help create a plastic-free land and sea. Work with colleagues, learn about pollution, and enjoy a fun, impactful 2-hour eco-activity that leaves a lasting positive mark on the planet.

tours.name: Combination ticket - Cocktail at LuminAir & Amsterdam Canal Cruise
tours.description: Float through Amsterdam’s scenic canals, then toast to stunning skyline views from the skybar’s terrace with a refreshing cocktail. An unforgettable blend of water, city, and sky awaits you.

tours.name: Giethoorn and Zaanse Schans
tours.description: Experience the enchanting charm of Giethoorn and Zaanse Schans on this 8-hour tour. Glide through picturesque canals on a guided boat ride, marvel at iconic windmills, and visit a wooden shoe workshop. Perfect for capturing unforgettable memories in authentic Dutch villages, this adventure is a must for any traveler.

tours.name: Excursión a Kinderdijk y Gouda
tours.description: Explore the Netherlands' golden age with a day at Kinderdijk’s UNESCO windmills, then wander Gouda’s historic streets, marvel at stunning architecture, and taste world-famous cheese on this immersive 8-hour tour.

tours.name: Klassenuitje 2 uur
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s highlights in 2 hours: explore Jordaan, Vondelpark, the iconic canals, the narrowest house, and the love bridge, all with a friendly guide at a relaxed pace.

tours.name: Schilder je eigen tegel! (Putten)
tours.description: Enjoy a warm drink as you receive a quick intro, then dive right in to create your own tile, blending relaxation with hands-on fun in a cozy setting.

tours.name: Amsterdam Highlights Fietstour met Lunch
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s iconic canals and historic sights, then relax with a traditional Dutch lunch in Vondelpark. Enjoy views of the Rijksmuseum, Magere Brug, and learn fun stories from a friendly guide.

tours.name: One Hour Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the joy of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges thanks to our insurance. With a wide selection for the whole family, we guarantee you'll find the perfect ride for your adventure!

tours.name: Three Hour Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the joy of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With a wide selection for the whole family and guaranteed availability, your perfect ride awaits. Just bring a credit card or ID to get started!

tours.name: Full Day Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the city like never before with MacBike's full-day bicycle rentals! Enjoy top-quality bikes designed for comfort, family-friendly options, and peace of mind with no damage charges. With a wide selection available, you’re guaranteed to find the perfect ride for your adventure. Rent your bike and explore today!

tours.name: Two Day Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the city like never before with MacBike's full-day bicycle rentals! Enjoy top-quality bikes designed for comfort, family-friendly options, and peace of mind with no damage charges. With a wide selection available, you’re guaranteed to find the perfect ride for your adventure. Get ready to explore!

tours.name: Three Day Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the city like never before with MacBike's full-day bicycle rentals! Enjoy the best bikes in town, perfect for families, and ride worry-free with included insurance and locks. With a wide selection available, you’re guaranteed to find the ideal bike for your adventure. Explore and create unforgettable memories!

tours.name: Four Day Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the thrill of exploring the city on a top-quality bike from MacBike! With a full-day rental, enjoy family-friendly options, complimentary locks, and peace of mind with damage insurance. Discover the freedom of cycling without worries—your perfect adventure awaits!

tours.name: Five Day Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the city like never before with MacBike's full-day bicycle rentals! Enjoy the best bikes in town, perfect for families, with no damage charges and included locks for peace of mind. With a wide variety of bikes always in stock, adventure awaits you and your loved ones!

tours.name: Six Day Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the thrill of exploring the city on a top-quality bike from MacBike! With a full day of rental, family-friendly options, and no damage charges, you can ride worry-free. Enjoy the freedom of choice with a wide variety of bikes, ensuring a memorable adventure for everyone.

tours.name: Giethoorn Luxury Private Bus Tour + Zaanse Schans (7 guests)
tours.description: Experience the enchanting beauty of Giethoorn, the “Venice of the North,” on a private tour. Cruise its serene canals, explore charming thatched cottages, and enjoy a scenic drive through tulip fields. Optionally visit Zaanse Schans for windmills, making this a memorable blend of nature, culture, and history.

tours.name: Paseo en Barco con guía en Español
tours.description: Glide through iconic canals with a Spanish-speaking guide, uncovering hidden stories, stunning architecture, and local secrets. Perfect for relaxing, snapping photos, and immersing yourself in the city’s vibrant history.

tours.name: Children Group Lesson Olympiaplein
tours.description: Join the biggest skate school in the Netherlands for weekly lessons in the heart of the city! Perfect for beginners, you'll learn essential skills like stopping and turning while building confidence in a safe environment. Progress at your own pace and prepare for the vibrant streets of Amsterdam or the skatepark!

tours.name: Children Group Lesson House of Urban Sports (indoor)
tours.description: Join the biggest skate school in the Netherlands for weekly lessons in a unique wooden indoor skatepark. Perfect for beginners, you'll learn essential skills like stopping and turning, all while building confidence in a safe environment. Progress at your own pace and prepare for the vibrant streets of Amsterdam!

tours.name: Children Group Lesson Utrecht Griftpark
tours.description: Join the biggest skate school in the Netherlands for weekly lessons in a unique wooden indoor skatepark! Perfect for beginners, you'll learn essential skills like stopping and turning while building confidence in a safe environment. Progress at your own pace and prepare for real-world skating adventures in Utrecht!

tours.name: Share a Bike Utrecht
tours.description: Join the ultimate Utrecht party on our shared bike, sipping cold drinks, dancing to lively tunes, and making new friends as you pedal around for 75 minutes of pure fun and lively vibes.

tours.name: Shared Cruise on the Pien • Hotel Estheréa departure
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s hidden canals on a cozy 90-minute cruise, away from crowds. Sip drinks from an open bar, enjoy tasty snacks, and hear lively stories about the city’s past and present in a relaxed, friendly setting.

tours.name: Amsterdam Historico
tours.description: Explore the captivating history of Amsterdam on a guided tour that reveals the city's unique culture and traditions. With nine intriguing stops, including the iconic Central Station and the historic Jewish Quarter, this 2.5 to 3-hour experience promises to surprise and delight, making it a memorable adventure for all.

tours.name: Sunday Night Live
tours.description: Enjoy a one-night-only improv comedy show where each performance is unique, funny, and spontaneous. Relaxed, lively, and perfect to wind down your weekend with surprises and laughter.

tours.name: [Academy] Improv Taster Class
tours.description: Try a fun 2-hour improv taster with Boom Chicago actors, where you'll explore spontaneity, listening, and commitment—no experience needed. Decide to join full courses later, and this session counts toward it!

tours.name: Comedy Walks© Amsterdam Museum Quarter
tours.description: Join a lively local comedian for a 90-minute Comedy Walk© through Amsterdam’s streets. Laugh out loud as humor and city sights blend into an unforgettable experience. Perfect for ages 14 and up, this tour turns sightseeing into a hilarious adventure you won’t want to miss.

tours.name: Gassan Diamond Experience Tour
tours.description: Experience the captivating world of diamonds at GASSAN Diamonds, housed in a beautifully restored 1879 diamond factory. Witness skilled craftsmen transform rough stones into stunning gems, explore the unique GASSAN 121 cut, and browse an exquisite collection of jewelry and watches, including an exclusive Rolex Boutique. A must-visit gem!

tours.name: Kinderfeestjes
tours.description: Celebrate kids' birthdays with an hour of thrilling VR adventures like racing, zombie battles, flying, and escape games, plus free drinks and chips—perfect for ages 4-12 to have fun and stay active.

tours.name: Bedrijfsuitje
tours.description: Jump into a thrilling hour of VR adventures like racing, zombie battles, or flying, tailored for all ages. Feel the rush, move actively, and explore the exciting world of virtual and augmented reality.

tours.name: Luxury Shopping Experience
tours.description: Experience the ultimate in luxury shopping at Royal Coster Diamonds. Enjoy a private showroom, expert guidance, and complimentary champagne while exploring a stunning collection of 20,000 loose diamonds. With the option for custom designs and tax-free shopping, this exclusive experience promises to make your jewelry dreams come true.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour
tours.description: Skip the lines and explore Van Gogh’s masterpieces with a expert guide. Dive into his life, art evolution, and hidden stories, then enjoy extra hours to see your favorite works at your own pace.

tours.name: Private Day Trip to Rotterdam and The Hague
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s innovative architecture and visit iconic sites like Cube Houses and Markthal. Then, stroll through The Hague’s historic Parliament, royal palaces, and the Peace Palace on this personalized 8-hour tour.

tours.name: Cycle through Old Holland's countryside with windmills
tours.description: Cycle through Dutch wetlands and windmills, visit a working mill, explore historic neighborhoods, and taste cheese at Zaanse Schans—all at a relaxed pace in stunning, authentic scenery.

tours.name: Save the Groom - Amsterdam
tours.description: Race through the city solving riddles and cracking codes in this outdoor smartphone detective game. Can your team find the suspects and save the Groom before the wedding? 90 minutes of fun and mystery await.

tours.name: The Big Escape - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a thrilling 90-minute virtual heist with your friends, solving puzzles and cracking codes to open the casino safe. Meet expert insiders, dodge the cops, and escape with the loot in just 15 minutes.

tours.name: City Bike verhuur per uur
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local by exploring the city on a sturdy city bike! Choose from rentals of one hour, three hours, or a full day. With options for families and additional accessories, this bike adventure promises a unique and memorable way to navigate the vibrant streets of the cycling capital.

tours.name: City Bike verhuur voor meerdere dagen
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local by exploring the city on a sturdy bike! Available for 24 hours to a week, our reliable city bikes come with locks and optional extras like helmets and child seats. Discover the charm of the cycling capital while enjoying the freedom of two wheels.

tours.name: Kinderfiets verhuur per uur
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before by exploring the city on a sturdy bike! Choose from one-hour, three-hour, or full-day rentals and enjoy the freedom of cycling in the world's biking capital. With options for children and added safety gear, this adventure promises unforgettable memories and effortless mobility.

tours.name: Kinderfiets verhuur voor meerdere dagen
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before by cycling through its vibrant streets! Rent a sturdy bike for 24 hours to a week, complete with a secure lock. Perfect for families, with options for kids aged 9-13. Enhance your ride with helmets and other accessories for a memorable adventure in the cycling capital!

tours.name: Herenfiets verhuur per uur
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before by exploring the city on a sturdy bike! Choose from one-hour, three-hour, or full-day rentals and enjoy the freedom of cycling through the world's biking capital. With added safety options and convenient extras, this adventure promises a memorable way to discover the vibrant streets of Amsterdam.

tours.name: Herenfiets verhuur voor meerdere dagen
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before by exploring the city on a sturdy bike! With rentals available from 24 hours to a week, you’ll navigate the cycling capital effortlessly. Enjoy added safety with optional helmets and accessories, ensuring a memorable adventure through the vibrant streets of this iconic city.

tours.name: Elektrische fiets verhuur
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before by exploring its vibrant streets on a sturdy rental bike! Available for 3 hours to 4 days, this eco-friendly adventure allows you to navigate the city effortlessly. Enjoy added safety with optional helmets and accessories, making your cycling journey both fun and secure.

tours.name: Tandem verhuur
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam like never before on a sturdy tandem bike! Perfect for couples or friends, this unique experience allows you to navigate the city’s vibrant streets at your own pace. With options ranging from one hour to three days, it’s an unforgettable way to discover the cycling capital of the world.

tours.name: Baggage opslag
tours.description: Discover the freedom to explore the city without the burden of your baggage! Our secure storage service, conveniently located near the Central Station, offers flexible options for 1 hour, 3 hours, or a full day. Enjoy your adventure while we take care of your belongings safely and easily.

tours.name: Museumweek rondleiding met toegangsbewijs
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s Diamant Museum and uncover 400 years of diamond history. See legendary jewels, learn how diamonds form over billions of years, and become a true diamond expert in just one hour.

tours.name: Centro Histórico e Moinhos - Tour Privado
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 7-hour journey from Amsterdam to the picturesque Zaanse Schans, where you'll explore historic windmills, witness traditional wooden clog-making, and savor delicious Dutch cheeses. After a lunch break, dive into Amsterdam's rich history, visiting iconic sites like the Dam and the Flower Market, ensuring an unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Centro Histórico: DAM, Bairro Chinês, Bairro Judeu e Mercado das Flores - Tour Privado
tours.description: Embark on a captivating three-hour private tour of Amsterdam's historic center, exploring its rich past from a fishing village to a commercial powerhouse. Discover unique aspects of Dutch life, including the history of prostitution and drug legalization, while enjoying tastings of traditional chocolates and cheeses. Tailored to your pace, this experience promises to leave you enchanted by the city.

tours.name: Jordaan, Anne Frank, Leidseplein, Vondelpark e Museumplein - Tour Privado
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local on this captivating 3-hour private walking tour. Explore the city's iconic canals, unique architecture, and significant historical sites, including the Anne Frank House. Tailored to your interests and pace, this immersive journey through Jordaan, Vondelpark, and the Museumplein promises unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Tour Red Light District
tours.description: Embark on a unique two-hour tour of Amsterdam's Red Light District, where you'll uncover the intriguing history of prostitution and drug legalization. With a knowledgeable guide fluent in Portuguese and Spanish, explore the secrets behind the district's iconic red lights and learn the differences between coffee shops and smartshops.

tours.name: Tour Red Light District - Tour Privado
tours.description: Embark on a unique two-hour tour of Amsterdam's Red Light District, where you'll uncover the intriguing history of prostitution and drug legalization. With a knowledgeable guide fluent in Portuguese and Spanish, explore the secrets behind the iconic red lights and the distinctions between coffee shops and smartshops in an open, taboo-free environment.

tours.name: Tour Jordaan, Anne Frank, Leidseplein
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local on this captivating two-hour walking tour through its picturesque canals and intriguing streets. Discover iconic houseboats, lean facades, and the poignant history of Anne Frank's home. With expert guides, immerse yourself in the city's unique architecture and vibrant culture, making unforgettable memories along the way.

tours.name: Informative Walk and Talk
tours.description: Explore the intriguing history of Amsterdam's red-light district with a unique "Walk 'n Talk" experience led by sex workers. Gain firsthand insights into the sex industry, its challenges, and legal framework. Engage in open discussions, reflect on your perceptions, and discover the area’s complexities while walking at your own pace.

tours.name: Canal Parade - 7 Hours - All Drinks Included -  Amstel
tours.description: Celebrate the Canal Parade from a lively open boat, with 7 hours of drinks, great views, and a skipper to keep the party going. Arrive early and enjoy the best spot to watch the parade pass by.

tours.name: Canal Parade - 8 Hours - All Drinks Included - Prinsengracht
tours.description: Celebrate Canal Parade 2025 from a lively open boat, soaking up vibrant views for 8 hours. Enjoy a skipper, onboard toilet, and prime vantage points along Prinsengracht—an unforgettable parade experience.

tours.name: Biglietti di ingresso + visita guidata Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Explore the Rijksmuseum’s treasures in 90 minutes: masterpieces by Rembrandt, Vermeer, and Hals, stunning ceramics, dramatic naval scenes, antique musical instruments, charming dollhouses, and a beautiful Cuypers-designed library.

tours.name: Diner bij de Brakke Grond
tours.description: Enjoy a cozy Flemish dinner at De Brakke Grond, a vibrant cultural hub. Savor a selection of local dishes, from hearty stews to veggie tartes, in a lively atmosphere that celebrates art, food, and community.

tours.name: Stadspas
tours.description: Experience an exciting 45-minute VR adventure designed for kids aged 3 to 14, exclusively available with a valid Amsterdam City Pass. Located on the first floor of Ballorig, this unique VR center offers thrilling games that promise unforgettable fun. Just ring the bell for entry—no need to go through Ballorig!

tours.name: Repairing Sewing Course: Basics (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Master basic clothing repairs in just two sessions. Learn to fix seams, holes, shorten pants, sew buttons, and more with expert guidance. Bring your clothes or use provided materials—skills to save and customize your wardrobe.

tours.name: The Good, The Bad, and The Algorithm | Our Hit Comedy Show!
tours.description: Laugh out loud at Boom Chicago’s fast-paced, tech-themed comedy show. Sharp improv, catchy music, and hilarious scenes explore how social media and AI shape our lives—only in Amsterdam’s Rozengracht.

tours.name: Public Midweek Cheese Shopping Walk & 300 year old Tavern Workshop
tours.description: Embark on a unique 3-hour cheese tasting adventure in Amsterdam, exploring top cheese shops and savoring exceptional selections not found in typical tourist spots. Enjoy a delightful pairing of artisanal cheeses with craft beers or wine at a historic tavern, while learning about cheese-making, storage, and serving techniques.

tours.name: Private Cheese Shopping & Dutch Wine Workshop
tours.description: Savor a 4-hour private tour through charming city streets, tasting local cheeses and wines, visiting specialty shops, and relaxing at a cozy café—an indulgent journey for cheese and wine lovers.

tours.name: Private Cheese Shopping & 300 year old Tavern Workshop
tours.description: Explore the city’s best cheese shops, enjoy expert pairings with craft beers or wines, and relax in historic taverns and cafes on a personalized 4-hour tasting walk—delight your senses and indulge your palate.

tours.name: The real Amsterdam: History, WWII & the liberal soul (Private tour)
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s true soul with a private guide, exploring its Golden Age, WWII scars, and modern tolerance. Enjoy hidden alleys, a cozy café, VR history, and a Polaroid keepsake in this immersive 3-hour journey.

tours.name: Private Bike Tour: Classic Countryside
tours.description: Experience the enchanting Dutch countryside on the "Countryside Charm" cycling tour. Over 3 to 4 hours, enjoy a scenic 20-25 km ride through picturesque landscapes, local farms, and cultural highlights. Perfect for families and beginners, this leisurely adventure promises memorable moments, delicious cheese tastings, and engaging insights into Dutch traditions.

tours.name: Bike tour: Long-distance countryside
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable 8-hour cycling adventure through the enchanting Dutch countryside. Discover traditional cheese-making, iconic wooden shoes, and innovative water management while pedaling scenic routes. Experience local culture, taste authentic flavors, and connect with nature, all while navigating like a true Dutch cyclist. A perfect blend of exploration and immersion awaits!

tours.name: Private bike ECO city tour
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before on the “Urban Eco-Cycle” bike tour! In just three hours, explore vibrant neighborhoods, serene parks, and iconic landmarks while uncovering the city’s rich history, culture, and environmental innovations. Led by passionate guides, this unique adventure promises fun facts and insights into Amsterdam’s diverse spirit.

tours.name: Amsterdam bike ECO city tour
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before on the “Urban Exploration” bike tour! In just three hours, ride through vibrant neighborhoods, lush parks, and historic landmarks while uncovering the city’s rich culture, diverse history, and innovative sustainability efforts. Led by passionate guides, this adventure promises unforgettable insights and hidden gems waiting to be discovered.

tours.name: Hot & happening Noord - Instap Fietstour
tours.description: Cycle through vibrant Noord, a lively district full of creative spaces, green areas, and historic sites. Enjoy a 3-hour guided ride ending with a drink at the city’s oldest café.

tours.name: The Comedy Embassy | Amsterdam's Best Stand-Up Comedy
tours.description: Laugh out loud with top international comedians at Amsterdam’s premier comedy show. Enjoy four hilarious acts, a full bar, and a lively atmosphere—no passport needed, just pure entertainment.

tours.name: Day Tour to Zaanse Schans, The Hague, and Rotterdam from Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore the Netherlands in a single day with this vibrant tour. Wander through Zaanse Schans’s windmills and traditional crafts, stroll past The Hague’s historic landmarks and royal parks, then marvel at Rotterdam’s innovative architecture and bustling market. Experience Dutch culture, history, and modern design all in one unforgettable journey.

tours.name: Mixbike Utrecht Beer and prosecco on one Bike
tours.description: Hop on a 90-minute Utrecht tour combining beer and prosecco, with lively sightseeing, music, and social fun. Enjoy unlimited drinks from taps and bottles while exploring the city’s best spots with friends.

tours.name: Top 10 Tastes of Amsterdam: Guided Walking Food Tour
tours.description: Yummy! • 3 hours • Incl: All Top 10 Sweet & Savory Dutch Foods & Drinks • Small groups

tours.name: FREE storico ENG
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s rich history and vibrant culture on a flexible tour. See iconic sights, learn local secrets, and get tips to enjoy the city independently—an engaging intro to this multicultural, bike-loving city.

tours.name: Private cruise on the Pien • Hotel Estheréa departure
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s hidden canals on a 90-minute all-inclusive cruise, avoiding crowds. Sip drinks, nibble on treats, and hear fascinating stories about the city’s past and present from an expert captain.

tours.name: Kano 1.5 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of paddling in the scenic Amsterdamse Bos for 1.5 hours! Perfect for all ages, this unique adventure allows you to connect with nature while enjoying the tranquility of the water. Don’t forget to bring an ID or driver’s license as a deposit for this unforgettable outing!

tours.name: Plastic Fishing -  Secondary Schools & Students (Amsterdam)
tours.description: Join a lively 2-hour boat trip where teams race to collect the most plastic waste and find unique items in the canals, turning awareness into action while having fun and making a real environmental impact.

tours.name: Kids Sewing Lessons (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Kids aged 7-12 can learn sewing, pattern cutting, embroidery, weaving, and more in fun, hands-on classes. With expert guidance, they build skills, confidence, and creativity while exploring re-used materials and their own ideas.

tours.name: Amsterdam Bike and Boat Tour Combo
tours.description: Pedal through Amsterdam’s vibrant neighborhoods on a lively 1.5-hour guided bike tour. Glide past historic landmarks like Dam Square, the Anne Frank House, and scenic canals. Listen to captivating stories, snap photos, and soak up the city’s rich culture—all in a comfortable, fun-filled ride.

tours.name: Cruise & Jazz door de grachten in overdekte boot met live muziek
tours.description: Experience the enchanting ambiance of Amsterdam's canals on a unique Jazz Canal Cruise. Enjoy a one-hour journey accompanied by live performances from emerging local jazz musicians as the sun sets and city lights shimmer on the water. This stylish cruise promises an unforgettable evening for music lovers and romantics alike.

tours.name: Walk-in bookings
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before on a luxurious, 100% electric cruise. Enjoy stunning views of iconic canals and hidden gems while sipping drinks served by a charming hostess. With an engaging skipper sharing fascinating stories, this hour-long journey promises a unique blend of relaxation and discovery in the heart of the city.

tours.name: Topdeck Countryside North E-Bike Tour, Long route
tours.description: Cycle through Dutch countryside on an e-bike, crossing canals and dikes, visiting a cheese and clog farm, and exploring charming villages like Monnickendam. Enjoy scenic views, local stories, and authentic Dutch treats.

tours.name: Natural Dyeing Workshop: Wall Tapestry by Atelier Nachtvlinder
tours.description: Transform leaves into art with a 4-hour eco-printing workshop. Create a stunning linen wall tapestry using natural pigments, learn plant stories, and craft a unique piece to bring nature into your home.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop: Lace Bag
tours.description: Create your own stylish lace bag in just 3 hours! Using upcycled lace and a sewing machine, you'll craft a unique accessory—perfect for beginners. Leave with a beautiful, eco-friendly bag you made yourself.

tours.name: Edam e Volendam - l'Olanda autentica
tours.description: Explore charming Dutch villages in just 4 hours. Visit Edam and Volendam, enjoy scenic canals, traditional houses, and local cheese and fish. Perfect for a quick, authentic taste of the Dutch countryside.

tours.name: Excursión privada Gouda y Kinderdijk
tours.description: Explore Holland’s iconic windmills at Kinderdijk and stroll through Gouda’s historic streets, tasting famous cheese and uncovering centuries of Dutch ingenuity and trade—all in an 8-hour adventure from Amsterdam.

tours.name: Excursión privada Brujas y Gante
tours.description: Explore medieval Bruges with its stunning canals and historic sites, then visit vibrant Ghent’s palaces and castles. Enjoy personalized tours, delicious chocolates, and scenic boat rides on this unforgettable 13-hour private trip.

tours.name: Excursión Privada Brujas
tours.description: Explore the medieval charm of Bruges with a private tour from Amsterdam, strolling its UNESCO-listed streets, admiring historic sights, and enjoying local chocolates, beers, or a scenic canal cruise at your pace.

tours.name: Excursión Privada Róterdam - La Haya y Madurodam
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s modern architecture, visit historic La Haya’s landmarks, and marvel at tiny Dutch masterpieces in Madurodam—all in a personalized 7-hour private tour starting from your hotel.

tours.name: Anne Frank Tour Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam's rich history on a poignant 2-hour walking tour that delves into the Jewish community's past and the impact of World War II. Guided by an expert, you'll journey from the historic Jewish Quarter to the Anne Frank House, experiencing the city's resilience and the emotional weight of its history.

tours.name: Culinary Hunt Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a unique culinary adventure through Amsterdam's Jordaan and 9 Streets with a thrilling treasure hunt! Discover local eateries, savor diverse international snacks, and solve clues to uncover hidden gems. Enjoy a playful exploration of the neighborhood, with vegetarian options available and remote assistance for a worry-free experience.

tours.name: Keukenhof – Giethoorn Private Tour
tours.description: Experience the breathtaking beauty of the Netherlands on a private tour that combines the vibrant tulip fields of Keukenhof with the serene canals of Giethoorn. Enjoy personalized attention from knowledgeable guides, a relaxing boat ride, and the flexibility to customize your itinerary, ensuring an unforgettable day filled with stunning sights and rich culture.

tours.name: Guided Hiking Tour
tours.description: Embark on the iconic Haute Route trek, a 12-day adventure from Chamonix to Zermatt. Experience breathtaking landscapes, including glaciated mountains and lush valleys, while hiking among the Alps' highest peaks. Enjoy charming villages, quality accommodations, and hassle-free luggage delivery, making this journey an unforgettable exploration of Alpine beauty and culture.

tours.name: Amsterdam Evening Lights City Bike Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s illuminated landmarks, from Dam Square to cozy Jordaan streets, on a 1.5-hour guided bike tour. Enjoy stunning lights, fascinating stories, and a magical winter cityscape after dark.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum Private Tour
tours.description: Embark on a private guided tour of the Rijksmuseum, exploring masterpieces from the Dutch Golden Age, including Rembrandt's The Night Watch. Enjoy exclusive access, skip-the-line entry, and personalized attention from your expert guide, who will share captivating insights tailored to your interests, making this an unforgettable art experience.

tours.name: All Inclusive  SAIL Cruise | 3 Hours
tours.description: Celebrate SAIL 2025 from the water on a luxury electric boat, enjoying gourmet bites, unlimited drinks, and front-row views of fireworks and tall ships in a festive, all-inclusive 3-hour cruise.

tours.name: The Boat Café Private Tour
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s canals on a cozy boat, taking in stunning architecture and lively sights. Sip drinks, enjoy tasty bites, and customize your tour for the perfect city adventure.

tours.name: Private Dutch Blue Tile Painting Workshop
tours.description: Paint your own Delft Blue tile in a 75-minute workshop, blending hands-on artistry with Dutch history. Create a unique masterpiece while learning traditional techniques and stories behind this iconic craft.

tours.name: Amsterdam Bike Rental | 2-Hour Rentals
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s charming streets on a classic rental bike, soaking up vibrant sights and local life with every pedal stroke. An authentic way to explore the city’s unique charm.

tours.name: Amsterdam Bike Rental | 4-Hour Rentals
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s charming streets on a classic rental bike, soaking in vibrant sights and lively neighborhoods. Feel the breeze and embrace the city’s timeless charm on two wheels.

tours.name: Combination ticket - Cocktail at LuminAir & Amsterdam Canal Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s charming canals with a relaxing cruise, then stroll through historic neighborhoods to sip cocktails at skybar LuminAir, offering stunning city views—an unforgettable day in the Dutch capital.

tours.name: Snaxe Throwing
tours.description: Unleash your inner Viking with 60 minutes of axe throwing, warm snacks, and a drink of your choice. Perfect for groups of 6 or more—fun, fierce, and no experience needed!

tours.name: Indonesian open group cooking class
tours.description: Join a lively 3.5-hour Indonesian cooking class in Amsterdam, where you'll make and enjoy a flavorful rice table, taste homemade sambals, learn local ingredients, and share a fun, relaxed dinner with fellow food lovers.

tours.name: Thai open group cooking class
tours.description: Join a lively 3.5-hour Thai cooking class in Amsterdam, where you craft personalized dishes using fresh ingredients, enjoy a delicious dinner, and share stories with fellow food lovers in a cozy setting.

tours.name: Korean open group cooking class
tours.description: Join a lively 3.5-hour Korean cooking class, customize your menu, make kimchi and more, then enjoy a delicious dinner with new friends in a cozy setting. Perfect for individuals, couples, and families.

tours.name: Small Group  - Anne Frank & the Jewish History of Amsterdam inc. VR Experience
tours.description: Embark on a poignant private tour through Amsterdam's historic Jewish Quarter, tracing the journey of Jewish families since the 16th century. Discover significant sites, including the Portuguese Synagogue and memorials, before experiencing a virtual reality visit to the Anne Frank House, guided by knowledgeable locals who unveil the city's hidden stories.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Amsterdam Privé
tours.description: Alle leeftijden • 3 uur • Maximaal 10 personen

tours.name: Private Walking Tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before with a private tour designed just for your group. Enjoy personalized attention from an experienced guide as you explore iconic landmarks and hidden gems at your own pace. Tailored to your interests, this unique experience ensures unforgettable memories in the heart of the city.

tours.name: Giethoorn Tour
tours.description: Experience the enchanting beauty of Giethoorn, the "Venice of the North," on a private tour. Glide through serene canals in a whisper boat, explore charming bridges, and learn about the village's rich history. Tailored activities for kids and stunning photo opportunities make this half-day adventure truly unforgettable.

tours.name: One Week Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the freedom of cycling with MacBike! Rent top-quality city bikes for a full day, ensuring fun for the whole family. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With a wide selection always available, your perfect ride awaits—just bring a credit card or ID!

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through Van Gogh's life with a knowledgeable guide at the Van Gogh Museum. Discover iconic masterpieces like Sunflowers and The Bedroom, delve into his emotional expression and artistic evolution, and gain insights into his final years in Arles. Conclude with a thoughtful discussion and optional café visit.

tours.name: Privé Dinervaart Amsterdam / Private Dinner Cruise Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience an exclusive two-hour private dining cruise for up to four people through the enchanting canals of Amsterdam, the Amstel, and the IJ. Sit back and relax as you savor delicious food and drinks, all while taking in the stunning views of the city from the water.

tours.name: The Canal Experience – Classic Tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam's charm on a private or shared canal cruise, guided by an experienced captain. Enjoy captivating stories and insider tips as you glide past iconic sights and historic canals, making it an unforgettable experience for families, friends, or corporate outings seeking a unique perspective of the city.

tours.name: Private / Discreet Luxury Smoke-Friendly Canal Cruise
tours.description: Sail Amsterdam’s canals on a sleek, flower-inspired boat with panoramic views, a relaxed atmosphere, and an open bar. Enjoy discreet luxury, stunning landmarks, and a cozy, elegant setting perfect for couples and small groups.

tours.name: Private - Authentic Open Boat Tour - 60 Min & longer - Incl. Dutch Souvenir
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s hidden waterways on a vibrant private boat, enjoying local stories, drinks, and customizable routes. Perfect for celebrations or relaxed gatherings with friends or colleagues.

tours.name: Golden Age City Center
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s hidden stories on a personalized walk through historic neighborhoods, from serene courtyards to lively squares, revealing the city’s rich maritime past, vibrant culture, and timeless charm.

tours.name: Dutch Waterland - Fishermen Villages
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 5-hour journey through the picturesque Dutch countryside, exploring charming fishing villages like Volendam and Monnickendam. Enjoy a delightful cheese tasting at a local farm and capture stunning moments by a windmill. This unique tour offers a blend of popular sights and hidden gems, perfect for any traveler.

tours.name: The Hague and Delft
tours.description: Explore The Hague, the political heart of the Netherlands, on a captivating 7-hour tour. Marvel at the stunning Panorama Mesdag, the world's largest panoramic painting, and enjoy free time to discover the city's rich art and culture, including museums and beautiful streets. A unique blend of history and beauty awaits!

tours.name: Street Food Tour
tours.description: Embark on a mouthwatering 3-hour street food tour in Amsterdam's vibrant De Pijp district. Led by a passionate local guide, savor Dutch delicacies like pickled fish and croquettes, explore the bustling Albert Cuyp Market, and uncover fascinating stories. Leave with a full belly and a craving for more culinary adventures!

tours.name: Guided Tour Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Experience the Rijksmuseum like never before on a captivating two-hour guided tour. Delve into the rich culture of the Dutch Golden Age, exploring masterpieces by Rembrandt and Vermeer. This interactive journey is perfect for all ages, offering insights into art, fashion, and culinary traditions that shaped the Netherlands.

tours.name: Jewish Quarter Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam's rich Jewish heritage on a captivating three-hour tour of the historic Jewish Quarter. Discover the poignant history of the community, visit significant sites like the Portuguese Synagogue, and learn about the impact of the Holocaust. Engage with the past and present perspectives of the Dutch towards Jewish culture.

tours.name: Tour on a unique Clog Bike - Visit a Dutch Cheese Farmer and a Clog Factory
tours.description: Cycle on a quirky clog bike to a Dutch cheese farm and clog factory, see windmills, enjoy a lakeside pancake break, and let kids craft and explore—an unforgettable family adventure full of fun, culture, and surprises.

tours.name: Breakfast at Coster
tours.description: Celebrate 180 years of Royal Coster Diamonds with a unique dining experience at their iconic location on Museum Square. Enjoy a delightful breakfast, lunch, or high tea, each crafted to perfection. Join in the festivities and savor the rich history while indulging in exquisite culinary offerings.

tours.name: Explore Nuenen by bike through the eyes of Vincent van Gogh
tours.description: Cycle through Van Gogh’s world from Eindhoven to Nuenen, visiting his historic sites and inspired landscapes. Enjoy scenic views, a starry night bike path, and immerse yourself in the artist’s life on this 9-hour adventure.

tours.name: Free Tour por Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore the rich history of Amsterdam on a captivating two-hour tour that reveals its evolution from a fishing village to a commercial powerhouse. Discover iconic sites like the Central Station and the Jewish Quarter, while savoring traditional Dutch chocolates and cheeses, ensuring a memorable connection to the city's vibrant culture.

tours.name: Street Art Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating three-hour Amsterdam Street Art Tour, guided by a local expert. Explore vibrant graffiti, delve into the city's squat culture, and capture stunning photos in the NDSM neighborhood. Optionally visit the renowned STRAAT museum, the largest street art museum in the world, for an unforgettable experience!

tours.name: SUP Board Rental • Houthavens
tours.description: Experience the thrill of stand-up paddleboarding with our stable, user-friendly boards suitable for all skill levels! No prior experience is needed—just a basic swimming ability and a sense of balance. Enjoy the water at your own pace, whether standing or kneeling, and create unforgettable memories on the water!

tours.name: MEGA SUP Rental • Amsterdam West
tours.description: Experience the thrill of paddleboarding with up to 10 friends on a single board! Perfect for parties, team-building, or just a fun day out, this unique adventure requires no prior experience. Enjoy the water, create unforgettable memories, and capture Instagram-worthy moments as you bond with your group.

tours.name: Workshop Vegan Baking - Amsterdam
tours.description: Learn to create stunning vegan cakes like lemon, mango-no-cheesecake, and chocolate with expert tips on egg substitutes and specialty ingredients. Bake, take home treats, and master vegan pastry in just 4.5 hours.

tours.name: Workshop Vegan Street Food - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join the Vegan Street Food workshop in Amsterdam for a delicious 4-hour experience where you'll master seven mouthwatering vegan street food dishes. Learn authentic recipes transformed into tasty vegan versions, guided by a skilled chef. Impress friends and family with your newfound culinary skills and take home recipes to recreate the magic!

tours.name: Private Amsterdam Light Festival Cruise
tours.description: Experience the enchanting Amsterdam Light Festival on a private luxury boat tour, where you'll discover stunning light artworks inspired by 'Technology and Artificial Intelligence.' Enjoy captivating stories from your guide, and savor your own snacks and drinks as you glide through the illuminated canals. Don't miss this seasonal spectacle!

tours.name: Kingsday Party Cruise Shared
tours.description: Celebrate Kingsday in style on a lively canal cruise with unlimited drinks, music, and dancing. Enjoy prime views of the festivities, meet fellow party-goers, and soak up the orange madness—rain or shine.

tours.name: Private Group: Amsterdam canal cruise
tours.description: Glide past Amsterdam’s iconic sights in 75 minutes from the Anne Frank House, with multilingual audio guides, stunning photo spots, and a cozy, heated boat—perfect for year-round exploring and capturing unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Fermentation: spice up your plant-based cuisine - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join this immersive 5.5-hour fermentation workshop conducted in Dutch, where you'll discover the art of transforming simple ingredients into flavorful, healthy dishes. Learn about various fermentation techniques, taste delicious products, and create your own kombucha, miso, and kimchi. Enhance your plant-based cooking with rich flavors and aromas!

tours.name: Vegan Academy's dinner night - Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience an unforgettable evening in downtown Amsterdam with a unique plant-based dinner crafted by Vegan Academy's top chefs. Enjoy a sumptuous 5-course meal, complete with exquisite drink pairings, while engaging with fellow guests and learning about plant-based cuisine. Limited seating ensures an intimate and memorable dining experience.

tours.name: Private Food Tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before on a private tour designed just for your group. With a dedicated guide, explore iconic sights and hidden treasures at your own pace. Tailored to your interests and preferences, this unique experience ensures unforgettable memories while savoring the city's rich culture and local flavors.

tours.name: Vegan Academy's Sunday Lunch - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join Vegan Academy for an unforgettable 4-hour plant-based lunch experience in Amsterdam. Savor a delightful 5-course meal crafted by top chefs, featuring unique dishes and exquisite drink pairings. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere at a beautifully set table, perfect for mingling with fellow food lovers. Reserve your spot now!

tours.name: Delicious Dam Tour
tours.description: Embark on a flavorful journey through Amsterdam’s historic center on this engaging food tour. Sample iconic Dutch treats like herring, stroopwafels, and aged cheese, all while uncovering the rich stories behind each dish. Led by a local foodie, this adventure promises laughter, delicious bites, and unforgettable memories. Come hungry!

tours.name: Keukenhof Luxury Private tour w. Canal Cruise & Tulip Experience
tours.description: Visit Keukenhof Gardens during tulip season with skip-the-line entry, guided stories, and free time to explore. Perfect for nature lovers and photographers seeking vibrant blooms and springtime magic.

tours.name: Kids Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on a thrilling outdoor scavenger hunt through Amsterdam's historic old docks, designed for young explorers aged 6–10. Armed with a treasure map, kids will solve riddles and uncover fascinating facts, culminating in a visit to the NEMO Science Museum. It's an interactive adventure where children become the heroes of their own story!

tours.name: Old Town District Tour
tours.description: Discover the magic of Amsterdam at night on a captivating walking tour through its historic streets and illuminated canals. Uncover tales of smugglers and secret societies while enjoying traditional Dutch beers and iconic snacks. With intimate group sizes and cozy café stops, this experience offers a unique blend of history and charm.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum Guided Tour
tours.description: Experience the Rijksmuseum like never before on this two-hour guided tour, featuring masterpieces by Rembrandt, Vermeer, and Van Gogh. Enjoy fast-track entry, captivating stories, and a small group setting that ensures a personal touch. Discover the art, history, and intriguing gossip that make this visit unforgettable.

tours.name: Van Gogh Private Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through Vincent van Gogh's life and art with Mary as your guide. This unique museum tour blends storytelling with emotional insights, exploring his iconic works and personal struggles. Experience art history that resonates deeply, leaving you not just informed, but truly connected to Van Gogh's spirit.

tours.name: Beer and Bitterballs evening stroll
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam's brown cafés on a cozy evening tour with Mary. Sip traditional Dutch beers, savor crunchy bitterballen, and stroll through historic neighborhoods. Discover the rich café culture and stories behind each unique stop, all while enjoying an intimate atmosphere that captures the essence of gezelligheid.

tours.name: Ravioli making workshop - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a captivating 4-hour workshop to master the art of making delicious plant-based ravioli! Learn the secrets of perfect pasta, explore unique fillings and sauces, and enjoy a delightful tasting experience with your creations. Leave with recipes and newfound skills to impress friends and family in your own kitchen!

tours.name: Workshop Kombucha - Amsterdam
tours.description: Learn to make your own healthy, fizzy kombucha in just 2.5 hours. Brew, flavor, bottle, and take home your custom batch, plus recipes and tips to keep brewing endlessly. Perfect for health and flavor enthusiasts.

tours.name: "Starlet" Private Canal Limousine
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s historic canals on the Starlet, a restored 1921 wooden launch with panoramic views, a silent electric engine, and cozy elegance—perfect for intimate gatherings or romantic escapes.

tours.name: The Canal Experience – Winter Special (October till March)
tours.description: Embark on a magical winter cruise in Amsterdam, where a beautifully decorated boat awaits you, adorned with Christmas lights and cozy blankets. Savor complimentary mulled wine or hot chocolate while indulging in delightful snacks. This unique experience promises romance and unforgettable memories amidst the enchanting winter scenery.

tours.name: Beginner Macrame Workshop: Skirt
tours.description: Create a stylish, handmade macramé skirt or shawl in just 3 hours. Learn core knots, build rhythm, and craft a unique accessory you can wear. All materials included—just bring your creativity and enjoy a relaxing, hands-on session.

tours.name: Amsterdam Bike Rental | 24-Hour Rentals
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s charming streets on a classic rental bike, soaking up the vibrant city sights and lively atmosphere at your own pace.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Wide Pants/Shorts
tours.description: Craft your own stylish T-shirt in 3 hours using organic fabrics, sewing patterns, and professional guidance. Learn to work with stretch materials, create seams, and finish hems—leave with a personalized, finished garment.

tours.name: Shot of Improv
tours.description: Join the wildest Thursday night in Amsterdam with spontaneous improv comedy driven by you. Enjoy half-price drinks, free shots for bold suggestions, and a lively, unpredictable show that keeps you on the edge of your seat.

tours.name: Visita Panorámica Privada Ámsterdam y Molinos Zaanse Schans
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s highlights and the rural charm of Zaanse Schans in a private 5-hour tour. Walk through historic neighborhoods, see iconic canals, visit windmills, and watch traditional wooden shoe making.

tours.name: Free Tour La Haya
tours.description: Experience the charm of The Hague on a captivating free tour that unveils the rich history and stunning architecture of this vital European city. Explore iconic sites like the Mauritshuis and the Binnenhof, while enjoying unique stories and breathtaking views. Your journey concludes with the opportunity to reward your guide based on their exceptional service.

tours.name: Regular Ticket
tours.description: Enjoy a lively 1.5-hour night out in Amsterdam with a four-course meal and an all-male show full of hot guys, fun, and outrageous entertainment—perfect for friends celebrating or just having a wild night.

tours.name: VIP Ticket
tours.description: Enjoy a 1.5-hour VIP night with front-row seats, a welcome drink, and no queues at Coqtales. Perfect for a fun girls' night with hot guys, outrageous entertainment, and unforgettable memories in Amsterdam.

tours.name: Couch Seats
tours.description: Enjoy 1.5 hours of prime seats, champagne for six, and no queues at Coqtales—Amsterdam’s top all-male show. Perfect for girls’ night, with hot guys, fun, and unforgettable moments await. Book early for the best spots!

tours.name: Kano 1 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of paddling in the stunning Amsterdamse Bos! This one-hour adventure is perfect for all ages, offering a unique way to explore the beautiful surroundings. Just bring an ID or driver's license as a deposit and get ready for an unforgettable day on the water!

tours.name: Kano 2 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of paddling in the scenic Amsterdamse Bos! This two-hour adventure welcomes all ages, making it a perfect outing for families and friends. Enjoy the beauty of nature while creating unforgettable memories on the water. Just remember to bring an ID or driver's license as a deposit!

tours.name: Elektroboot 1 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cruising on water in a unique vessel reminiscent of a Tesla! This one-hour adventure promises excitement and innovation, perfect for those seeking a memorable outing. Just bring an ID or driver's license as a deposit and get ready for an unforgettable ride!

tours.name: Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Explore the Rijksmuseum’s stunning architecture and 400 years of Dutch art, from Rembrandt to Van Gogh, in just 2 hours with an expert guide. Immerse yourself in masterpieces and history in the heart of Amsterdam.

tours.name: Varend terras
tours.description: Experience the unique "Vijverhopper tour" aboard the floating terrace, navigating from the large pond to the small pond and back. Perfect for small groups of up to 10 people, this memorable journey offers a serene way to enjoy the beauty of the surroundings while creating lasting memories together.

tours.name: Concierge Day in Amsterdam
tours.description: Enjoy a personalized, stress-free day in Amsterdam with private guides, scenic canal cruises, curated dining, museum visits, and drinks—all tailored to your pace and preferences for a seamless city experience.

tours.name: Amsterdam - Accessible Tour - Public Tour
tours.description: Explore the enchanting streets of Amsterdam on a personalized 3-hour guided tour, perfect for first-time visitors. Discover hidden gems and captivating stories from a local expert while enjoying accessible routes. Experience the city's vibrant culture as you visit iconic sites like Central Station, the Flower Market, and the historic Begijnhof.

tours.name: Privado a pie en Utrecht
tours.description: Explore Utrecht’s 2,000-year history with a guided tour through historic plazas, canals, and iconic sites like the Cathedral and Winkel van Sinkel, all led by a friendly Spanish-speaking guide.

tours.name: Alkmaar, Edam & Volendam + Farm & Beer Tasting
tours.description: Escape the crowds and dive into authentic Dutch life with a small-group tour. From cheese markets and hidden villages to a farm visit and local brewery, enjoy a day full of flavor, stories, and genuine connections.

tours.name: Amsterdam to Bruges bike & barge
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable 8-day bike and barge adventure through the picturesque landscapes of Holland and Belgium. Experience charming cities like Gouda and Bruges, explore UNESCO-listed windmills, and savor local delicacies. With guided tours, delicious meals, and stunning scenery, this journey promises a unique blend of culture and nature.

tours.name: Children Group Lesson Zeeburgereiland
tours.description: Join the biggest skate school in the Netherlands for a year-round weekly lesson in a unique wooden indoor skatepark. Perfect for beginners, you'll learn essential skills like stopping and turning while building confidence in a safe environment. Progress at your own pace and prepare for the streets of Amsterdam or the skatepark!

tours.name: The Attic Collective
tours.description: Join the Attic Collective monthly show for bold improv, quirky comedy, and inventive game shows that push creative limits. Experience fresh voices and daring performances in a lively, surprising atmosphere.

tours.name: Half-day private tour Keukenhof, tulips and beach
tours.description: See Holland’s stunning spring blooms in peace with a private, 4-hour tour. Visit Keukenhof early, explore hidden tulip fields, and enjoy personalized service with expert guides and luxury transport—perfect for a quick, unforgettable escape.

tours.name: Sweet Home Amsterdama | Our Brand New Comedy Show!
tours.description: Laugh through the chaos of modern housing in a lively improv show. Audience suggestions shape hilarious scenes about rent struggles, side hustles, and broken systems—because sometimes, laughter is the best shelter.

tours.name: Natural Dyeing Workshop: Silk Scarf by Atelier Nachtvlinder
tours.description: Transform a natural palette into a stunning silk scarf with five versatile styles. Learn eco-printing, explore plant stories, and craft a unique, eco-conscious accessory in a hands-on, inspiring workshop.

tours.name: Keukenhof and Flowerfields Tour • 4 Hours
tours.description: Explore 32 hectares of vibrant tulips and stunning blooms at Keukenhof. Enjoy scenic drives, lively flower parades, and beautiful photo opportunities—all in a 4-hour tour from Amsterdam.

tours.name: Wedding Proposal Onboard-Starboard
tours.description: Sail in safety with daily cleaned boats and excellent air flow, all for just €55 per person. Enjoy a worry-free cruise in a healthy, well-ventilated environment designed for your comfort.

tours.name: Privéwandeling Jordaan
tours.description: Stroll through the charming Jordaan, passing historic streets, the Westerkerk, and lively markets. Enjoy local stories, a cozy café break, and a chance to explore Amsterdam’s vibrant neighborhood in just 2 hours.

tours.name: Deluxe Flaneur Food Tour
tours.description: Discover the essence of Amsterdam on our Walking Food Tour, where delightful local delicacies meet the city's rich history and culture. This immersive experience invites you to savor unique flavors while exploring iconic spots, making it a memorable journey for food lovers and adventurers alike. Come hungry and embrace the local lifestyle!

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Stedelijk Museum
tours.description: Experience a captivating one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to the Stedelijk Museum, Amsterdam's premier destination for modern and contemporary art. Founded in the 1870s, this remarkable museum showcases an extensive collection, making it a must-see for art enthusiasts in the heart of the city's cultural hub.

tours.name: SAIL Shared Cruise | 1 Hour
tours.description: Celebrate SAIL 2025 from a luxury boat, cruising past majestic tall ships and vibrant festivities. Sip champagne, enjoy stunning views, and relax as expert crew handles every detail of this once-in-five-years maritime event.

tours.name: The Canal Experience – Private Events
tours.description: Create unforgettable memories with The Canal Experience – Private Events. Rent an entire boat for your special occasion, whether it’s a wedding, birthday, or corporate event. Customize every detail, from food and drinks to entertainment, while our professional crew ensures a seamless and memorable celebration on the water.

tours.name: SAIL Shared Sunset Cruise | 75 Minutes
tours.description: Celebrate SAIL 2025 with a 75-minute sunset cruise in Amsterdam. Sip bubbles, enjoy stunning views of the rare fleet, and relax as your crew handles everything—an unforgettable water adventure.

tours.name: SAIL Shared Fireworks Cruise | 2 Hours
tours.description: Celebrate SAIL 2025’s 10th anniversary with a 2-hour fireworks cruise. Sip a welcome drink, enjoy front-row views of dazzling fireworks, and soak in the stunning IJ harbor scenery aboard a comfortable boat.

tours.name: Leemstar's Luxurious Limousine Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s UNESCO canals on a cozy, exclusive boat with local skippers. Enjoy stunning views, warm blankets, and drinks as you explore the city’s historic waterways in style and comfort.

tours.name: Koningsvissen Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a lively canal cleanup in Amsterdam, fishing for plastic with boats, nets, and snacks. Cover different areas, stay safe with life jackets, and bring your own boat if you like—make a splash for the environment!

tours.name: Privé Amsterdam Light Festival Fietstour Met Gids
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s illuminated winter art scene on a cozy Yellow Bike, hear captivating stories, snap stunning photos, and warm up with a drink—all while supporting local artists.

tours.name: The Tulips Tour
tours.description: Embark on a vibrant half-day private tour of Holland's stunning tulip fields with your family. Enjoy breathtaking views, engaging activities for kids, and fascinating stories from a local guide. Visit the Tulip Museum to explore the rich heritage of these iconic flowers, creating unforgettable memories together.

tours.name: Amsterdam Private City Tour
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s heart on a two-hour SUP tour, passing iconic canals, seven historic bridges, and the famous Skinny Bridge. Feel the gentle ripples beneath you as you explore the vibrant Red Light District and the scenic Amstel River, experiencing the city from a unique perspective that’s both exciting and unforgettable.

tours.name: IJburg Beach Markermeer Private Tour
tours.description: Set sail from IJburg’s city beach for two unforgettable hours, soaking in stunning views of Durgerdam, Pampus Island, and Muidercastle. Glide across the water, feel the breeze, and witness iconic landmarks unfold before your eyes—an adventure that combines scenic beauty with a touch of history.

tours.name: SmartWalk SAIL
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before during SAIL 2025 with the SmartWalk guided tour on your smartphone. Uncover the city's rich maritime history at your own pace, exploring majestic tall ships and historic docks. This unique self-guided adventure reveals hidden gems and captivating stories that define Amsterdam's vibrant maritime legacy.

tours.name: Light Artwork Festival - Private Cruise
tours.description: Experience the enchanting Light Art Festival in Amsterdam from November 27th, 2025, to January 18th, 2026. Enjoy a private boat tour along the illuminated canals, showcasing stunning artworks and decorations. Choose from two exclusive 90-minute tours each night, with an option to extend your evening of magic.

tours.name: Prive Buffet of Diner op Maat Amsterdam light Festival
tours.description: Experience a unique private dinner aboard a beautifully decorated boat in Amsterdam. Choose from a gourmet 3, 4, or 5-course menu while cruising through the enchanting canals, illuminated by the Amsterdam Light Festival. Enjoy a magical evening as you savor exquisite cuisine amidst the stunning winter scenery of the historic city.

tours.name: Private Group Bubbles & Gourmet Bites  - Amsterdam Light Festival
tours.description: Experience the enchanting Amsterdam Light Festival from November 27, 2025, to January 18, 2026. This year's theme, "Legacy," invites you on a magical journey through imaginative light art. Discover the city's winter beauty as iconic buildings and bridges come alive with stunning illuminations, creating a captivating atmosphere unlike any other.

tours.name: Shared 'Things To Do In Amsterdam' Cruise
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam’s secret waterways with local guides who share personal stories, hidden spots, and authentic charm. This intimate 90-minute cruise offers tranquil canals, Dutch treats, and a Polaroid keepsake. Escape tourist crowds and experience the city’s true spirit through engaging tales, curated music, and peaceful scenery.

tours.name: Friends & Family Tour op Salonboot • Gin & Tonic Tour • Bier Proeverij Tour
tours.description: Sail on a vintage 1930 salon boat with up to 12 guests, enjoying gin, beer tastings, or regular tours. Choose 1 to 2 hours of fun, drinks included, in a charming historic setting.

tours.name: The Anne Tour
tours.description: Kids explore Amsterdam through Anne Frank’s eyes, visiting her streets and parks. They’ll hear her story, learn to write diaries, and spark their own storytelling dreams in a fun, inspiring tour.

tours.name: Pride Plastic Fishing Amsterdam 2025
tours.description: Join a lively canal cleanup on August 3rd, sailing with colorful boats to fish out plastic waste. All gear provided, snacks included, and fun guaranteed—help us make Amsterdam’s canals cleaner and brighter.

tours.name: Private '1921' Canal Limousine Tour
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam's canals in a vintage 1921 limousine or sunny Cabriolet cruiser, guided by a local captain. Celebrate with drinks, enjoy exclusive privacy, and make unforgettable memories on the water.

tours.name: Vietnamese open group cooking class
tours.description: Join a cozy 3.5-hour Vietnamese cooking class in Amsterdam, where you'll make and enjoy personalized dishes like spring rolls and pho, share stories, and learn secret ingredient tips in a friendly group setting.

tours.name: Biglietto di ingresso + visita guidata al museo Van Gogh
tours.description: Skip the lines with a guided 90-minute Italian tour of Van Gogh, then explore freely. Plus, enjoy exclusive access to the Kiefer exhibition—an unforgettable art journey in a small group.

tours.name: Masterclass Classique Française
tours.description: Savor authentic French flavors in a 5-hour masterclass in Amsterdam, featuring onion soup, tender entrecôte with Béarnaise, and Tarte Tatin. Indulge in a gourmet three-course meal with drinks and culinary tips.

tours.name: Cucina Povera - 4 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in the art of 'Cucina Povera' in Amsterdam, where you'll transform simple ingredients into exquisite dishes. Enjoy a hands-on cooking workshop, learn to make fresh pasta, and savor a delightful Italian menu. Perfect for team building, this experience promises culinary skills and unforgettable flavors.

tours.name: Classique Française - 4 courses
tours.description: 4 Course Menu • French • 4 Hours

tours.name: Classique Française - 4 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in the art of French cuisine with a four-hour cooking workshop in Amsterdam. Master classic dishes like steak tartare and entrecôte with béarnaise sauce, culminating in a delightful tarte Tatin. Perfect for enhancing culinary skills and fostering team spirit, this experience promises to tantalize your taste buds.

tours.name: Classique Française - 3 courses
tours.description: Embark on a culinary journey through French cuisine in the heart of Amsterdam! Over four hours, master classic dishes like steak tartare and entrecôte with bearnaise sauce, culminating in a delightful tarte Tatin. Perfect for team building, this workshop enhances your cooking skills while indulging your taste buds.

tours.name: Shared Kingsday Cruise
tours.description: Celebrate King's Day in Amsterdam from the water! Cruise vibrant canals for 3 hours, dance to lively music, and enjoy unlimited beer, wine, and soft drinks. Perfect views of crowds and decorated boats await you.

tours.name: Private SUP Lesson
tours.description: Enjoy a personalized hour on a stand-up paddleboard, perfect for beginners or seasoned paddlers. Learn the fundamentals or refine your technique in a private session tailored to your skill level. Feel the water beneath you and master your balance in a fun, focused environment designed to boost confidence and enjoyment.

tours.name: France: Provence Camargue bike & barge
tours.description: Experience the enchanting landscapes of Provence and Camargue on an unforgettable 8-day bike and barge adventure. Cycle through picturesque villages, savor local wines, and explore historic sites, all while enjoying the comforts of a floating hotel. This unique journey combines cycling, culture, and culinary delights for a truly memorable escape.

tours.name: Light Artwork Festival - Shared Cruise
tours.description: Experience the enchanting Light Art Festival in Amsterdam from November 27th, 2025, to January 18th, 2026. Join a cozy 90-minute canal tour with a maximum of 10 passengers, savoring gluhwein and Dutch treats while Captain Sebi shares captivating stories about the stunning light installations along the canals.

tours.name: Amsterdam Light Festival Rondvaart in Traditionele Rondvaartboot
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals on the Dream, a cozy boat offering stunning light art, expert stories, and warm drinks. Perfect for a magical winter night during the Light Festival’s "Legacy" theme.

tours.name: Pattern Drawing Workshop series 1.0  (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create custom-fit patterns in this 8-week workshop, mastering drafting, adjustments, and prototypes. Finish with three personalized blocks and the skills to turn your designs into reality. Ideal for confident sewists.

tours.name: Shared 1.5hrs Kingsday Cruise
tours.description: Celebrate King's Day from the water on our open-air boat, cruising vibrant canals with unlimited drinks, lively music, and stunning views of orange crowds and decorated boats—your perfect Dutch festival experience.

tours.name: Hotel & Corporate Bike Delivery
