tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s vibrant streets with colleagues, guided by a map and fueled by coffee or water. Enjoy 24 hours of fresh air, scenic views, and memorable moments on two wheels.

tours.name: Amsterdam Walking Tour
tours.description: Discover the charm of Old Amsterdam on a small group walking tour, limited to just 8 participants for an intimate experience. Over 3 hours, enjoy leisurely strolls, engaging discussions, and a break to delve deeper into the city's history while exploring its major sights at a relaxed pace.

tours.name: Private Amsterdam Red Light District Tour
tours.description: Experience the Amsterdam Red Light District like never before on this intimate 1.5-hour tour, limited to just 4 participants. Guided by passionate feminists Mark and Lee, you'll explore the area respectfully, ensuring the rights of sex workers are honored while enjoying a fun and slightly cheeky adventure.

tours.name: Amsterdam Windmill Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 6-hour journey through the Dutch countryside, exploring charming lanes and the picturesque town of Monnickendam. Enjoy coffee and apple pie in a historic building, visit a family farm, and tour a 400-year-old windmill, culminating in a delightful cheese and wine picnic. Experience the essence of rural Holland!

tours.name: [Community Night] The Academy Jam
tours.description: Join The Academy Jam to perform alongside talented Boom Chicago instructors. Step into the spotlight, showcase your skills, and be part of an exciting improv scene—your moment to shine on stage awaits.

tours.name: Jewish District
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s Jewish district in 3 hours, uncovering 400 years of history, resilient culture, and poignant memories at the Portuguese Synagogue and Holocaust Memorial with a local guide.

tours.name: Medieval Amsterdam Tour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s hidden history in a 2-hour walk through its medieval roots, Rembrandt’s footsteps, and a different side of the red light district—perfect for your first glimpse of the city’s tolerant, vibrant spirit.

tours.name: Jordaan Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s hidden charm in the Jordaan’s cozy alleys, historic cafes, and lively markets. Sip on traditional Dutch gin in one of its oldest bars and uncover the neighborhood’s unique, authentic culture.

tours.name: Golden Age (Half Day)
tours.description: Step back to Amsterdam’s 1600s Golden Age, exploring iconic museums and the UNESCO-listed Canal Ring. Uncover the city’s trade, art, and history with a private guide in just four unforgettable hours.

tours.name: Walk and Cruise
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s hidden courtyards, uncover 17th-century secrets, and glide along scenic canals on an electric boat—all in a lively 4-hour tour blending history, tranquility, and city charm.

tours.name: Jordaan Wandeling
tours.description: Stroll through the charming Jordaan, a tiny Amsterdam with rich stories, lively pubs, and iconic figures. In 2 hours, uncover hidden gems, local legends, and toast in the oldest pub with a shot of jenever.

tours.name: Tulip Tour bike & boat - 8 days
tours.description: Cycle through Holland’s stunning landscapes, visit colorful tulip gardens, explore historic towns like Gouda and Delft, see windmills at Kinderdijk, and enjoy charming villages and vibrant cities on an easy 8-day bike tour.

tours.name: Private walking tour of Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam with a private guide, uncovering its rich history, vibrant culture, and modern life in a personalized 2.5-hour tour. Perfect for all ages, with customizable options and insider tips.

tours.name: Excursión Bruselas
tours.description: Embark on a 12-hour adventure in Brussels, the heart of Belgium and the EU. Stroll through the stunning Grand Place, meet the iconic Manneken Pis, and savor authentic Belgian beer. Optional extras include a delicious lunch featuring mussels and waffles, and a tasting of four artisanal beers for a true local experience.

tours.name: Keukenhof and Flowerfields Tour • 5 Hours
tours.description: Explore Keukenhof’s stunning 32 hectares of vibrant tulips and flowers, enjoy scenic tulip field views, and immerse yourself in spring’s beauty with a guided or self-guided tour, all in a comfortable minivan from Amsterdam.

tours.name: Jordaan Wandeling Privé
tours.description: Explore the heart of Amsterdam in the Jordaan, strolling past cozy courtyards, lively markets, and iconic locals. End in the oldest pub with a shot of jenever—an authentic taste of this vibrant neighborhood.

tours.name: De Bazel Stadswandeling
tours.description: Join a lively 2-hour walk through hidden Amsterdam spots, meet locals shaping the city, and enjoy a free drink with bitterballen at De Bazel—perfect for discovering the city’s lesser-known stories.

tours.name: [Academy] Elective Class: Stand-Up
tours.description: Unleash your comedy voice in four weeks with expert techniques, confidence-boosting exercises, and joke writing basics. Walk away with the start of your own stand-up routine and newfound creative flair.

tours.name: Day Trip to Keukenhof
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 5-hour group tour to the stunning Keukenhof Gardens, the world's largest floral exhibition. Enjoy round-trip transport, park entrance, and insights from a Spanish-speaking guide. Marvel at vibrant tulips and other flowers while learning about their significance in Dutch culture, followed by three hours of exploration.

tours.name: Private Day Trip to Gouda and Kinderdijk
tours.description: Explore South Holland’s windmills at Kinderdijk and stroll through Gouda’s historic streets, tasting famous cheese and uncovering the region’s rich maritime and industrial history in an 8-hour tour.

tours.name: [Academy] 🎤 Presentational Skills Workshop 🎤
tours.description: Boost your presentation skills in 4 fun weeks using improv and comedy techniques. Learn to captivate, relax nerves, and deliver confidently—whether on stage or in the boardroom. Shine with every word you speak.

tours.name: Borrelboot Amsterdam
tours.description: Sail through the water in a clean, safe boat with daily sanitation and fresh air flow, enjoying a memorable cruise for just €39—perfect for a relaxing weekend escape.

tours.name: Private City Walk
tours.description: Uncover 750 years of Amsterdam in just two hours with a private guide. Learn why houses lean, explore the street plan, and get tips on eating, drinking, and public transport for your perfect city intro.

tours.name: [Community Night] Thuis Party!
tours.description: Laugh along with rising comedy stars from Boom Academy as they bring fresh, energetic acts to the stage. Join us on the final Sunday of the month at 8:30 PM and cheer on the next big thing in comedy.

tours.name: Secrets of Historical Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour walking tour through Amsterdam's historical center, guided by local experts. Discover hidden treasures, intriguing legends, and the city's rich history of commerce and trade. Experience the charm of medieval and Golden Age architecture while enjoying insightful stories that bring Amsterdam's past to life.

tours.name: [Community Night] PowerPints at Boom Chicago
tours.description: Laugh and learn at PowerPints, where quirky presenters deliver five-minute PowerPoint talks on wild topics like hypnotism, historic floods, or Sonic’s diet. Join the fun and see what surprises await this month!

tours.name: Hummer Limousine
tours.description: Experience the elegance of a limo ride through Amsterdam, tailored just for you! With a knowledgeable driver to share insights on the city's highlights and hidden gems, you can customize your route while enjoying music and LED lighting. Perfect for up to 8 people, this hour-long adventure promises unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Valentine's Day Improv Spectacular! Dinner & Comedy Show
tours.description: Laugh, sip, and share on Valentine's Day with hilarious comedy, flowing drinks, and tasty snack platters at Boom Chicago. Make it a fun, unforgettable night—reserve your spot now!

tours.name: CITY OF FREEDOM Private Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam's rich tapestry of freedom on this unique 1.5-hour tour. Discover hidden art spaces, a special coffeeshop, and a street-art garden while engaging with local change makers. Delve into the city's history and vibrant present, all while supporting small businesses and fostering connections within the community.

tours.name: TOLERANCE & MIGRATION Private Tour
tours.description: Discover the vibrant multicultural tapestry of Amsterdam East on this 1.5-hour tour. Explore the rich history of tolerance, delve into contemporary issues of migration and racism, and visit significant sites like the Holocaust memorial and the community-driven Meevaart center. Engage in meaningful discussions and reflect on building a harmonious society.

tours.name: COUNTERCULTURE Private Tour
tours.description: Discover the vibrant alternative culture of Amsterdam on this 1.5-hour tour of NDSM-Wharf, a former shipyard transformed into a creative hub. Meet local artists, explore unique workshops, and learn about the area's rich history and activism. Experience the dynamic blend of past and present in this artistic community.

tours.name: URBAN AGRICULTURE Private Special Tour
tours.description: Explore the hidden green gems of Amsterdam Oost on this engaging 2.5-hour tour, where you'll reconnect with nature and community through urban gardening. Discover innovative farming methods, visit vibrant community gardens, and enjoy the option of a delicious pizza made with fresh, local produce. Embrace sustainability in the heart of the city!

tours.name: THE CIRCULAR CITY Private Special Tour
tours.description: Embark on a transformative 2.5-hour tour in Amsterdam North, exploring its evolution from an industrial hub to a vibrant, sustainable community. Meet local change-makers, visit unique second-hand shops and cafes, and engage in discussions on contemporary issues. Experience the hidden gems of Amsterdam while supporting local initiatives and businesses.

tours.name: SUPER DIVERSITY Private Special Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2.5-hour tour of the Bijlmer, a vibrant melting pot of cultures and ideas. Discover its rich history, diverse communities, and inspiring projects that shape the future of Dutch society. Engage with local initiatives focused on collective identity and experience the essence of superdiversity firsthand.

tours.name: COLONIALISM TO FAIR TRADE Private Special Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2.5-hour journey through Amsterdam's Czaar Peter street, uncovering the hidden stories of Dutch trade's past. Experience sustainable shopping, meet passionate artisans, and indulge in exquisite single-origin chocolate at the Cacao Museum. This tour will transform your perspective on chocolate, souvenirs, and global impact.

tours.name: SUSTAINABLE FASHION Private Special Tour
tours.description: Embark on a transformative 2.5-hour journey into Dutch sustainable fashion, exploring its history, present innovations, and future possibilities. Discover vintage and zero-waste designs while meeting local change-makers. Learn how to make your wardrobe a force for good and contribute to a sustainable fashion movement that impacts the world.

tours.name: BEYOND THE CURTAINS  Private Special Tour
tours.description: Discover the hidden truths of Amsterdam's Red Light District on this enlightening 2.5-hour tour. Delve into the history of sexual repression, explore the complexities of prostitution, and engage with local initiatives. This unique experience not only educates but also supports the Prostitution Information Center, fostering a more inclusive conversation about sexuality.

tours.name: BACK TO NATURE Private Bike Tour
tours.description: Escape the city on a refreshing 2.5-hour bike tour through the charming village of Landsmeer and the scenic het Twiske area. Enjoy a delightful picnic featuring fresh garden produce, take a dip on warm days, and admire a traditional windmill, all while rejuvenating your body and mind in nature.

tours.name: Pep & Greg Politically Incorrect
tours.description: Comedy duo Pep Rosenfeld and Greg Shapiro deliver sharp, hilarious satire on American and Dutch society, blending political humor, improvisation, and spot-on impersonations that keep audiences laughing nonstop.

tours.name: Privé Jordaan Fietstour
tours.description: Cycle through the charming Jordaan, visit a local café, explore lively markets, and soak up Amsterdam’s rich history and vibrant atmosphere—all in two unforgettable hours.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop Series: Basics 1.0 (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Master sewing techniques in 8 structured evening sessions, creating samples like pockets, zippers, and collars. Get expert guidance, a helpful booklet, and all materials to turn your sewing skills into craftsmanship.

tours.name: ECNP Congress Fietshuur
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam like a local, passing vibrant neighborhoods and iconic sights. Rent a bike easily for ERS 2025 and enjoy eco-friendly, healthy travel with simple digital routes—explore, relax, and stay energized.

tours.name: WTF Improv
tours.description: Join the hilarious WTF Improv show, where audience stories inspire spontaneous characters, songs, and scenes. Be part of the fun or watch friends get transformed into comedy gold—guaranteed laughs and surprises!

tours.name: Public Cheese Market Shopping Walk & Dutch Wine Workshop
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s top cheese market on a 3-hour walk, tasting five unique cheeses paired with Dutch wines. Learn cheese secrets, enjoy stories, and uncover the flavors behind old, stinky, blue, and fresh varieties.

tours.name: German ALF Shared Cruise
tours.description: Enjoy a 1-hour, 15-minute adventure that immerses you in unforgettable sights and sounds, perfect for families and friends seeking a fun, engaging experience they'll remember long after it ends.

tours.name: Blooming Flowers Embroidery Workshop
tours.description: Create a vibrant spring embroidery artwork using basic stitches like French knots and lazy daisies. Perfect for beginners, with expert guidance, materials, and a cozy atmosphere to bring floral joy to your home.

tours.name: Beginner Crochet Workshop: Crop Top
tours.description: Create your own stylish crop top in just two sessions with expert guidance. Learn basic crochet stitches, customize your fit, and leave with a handmade piece—perfect for relaxing, creative fun.

tours.name: Food Tour
tours.description: Taste the city in 3.5 hours with a lively food tour! Sample local snacks, learn city stories, enjoy Dutch cheese, bitterballen, herring, and drinks—all while walking through historic spots starting at Rembrandtplein.

tours.name: Hot & happening Noord - Privétour
tours.description: Cycle through vibrant Noord, a lively mix of old shipyards, green spaces, creative hubs, and trendy spots. Enjoy a 3.5-hour guided ride ending with a drink at the city’s oldest café.

tours.name: Joods Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore Joods Amsterdam in 3 hours, walking or biking through historic sites, monuments, and synagogues. Learn about the community’s history, WWII impact, and remembrance traditions with a lively guide.

tours.name: Amsterdam - Accessible Canal Cruise
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam's stunning canals on a 75-minute cruise, gliding past iconic bridges and historic houses. Sail along the picturesque Prinsengracht, view the Anne Frank house, and learn through available audio tours. This unique perspective of the city is a must-do for any visitor, with accessible options for all.

tours.name: Amsterdam - Accessible Tour - Private Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam's rich history and vibrant culture on a personalized 3 to 4-hour guided tour. Led by a local expert, discover hidden gems and iconic sites like the Flower Market and Dam Square. This accessible experience is perfect for first-time visitors, ensuring a memorable journey through the city's unique architecture and stories.

tours.name: Amsterdam - Accessible Tour Second World War
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 3 to 4-hour historical tour of Amsterdam, exploring the profound impact of World War II on the Jewish community. Discover significant sites, including those linked to Anne Frank, and gain insights into Dutch resistance. Enjoy a customizable experience with an accessible route tailored to your needs.

tours.name: Accessible Tour Jordaan
tours.description: Explore the enchanting Jordaan district of Amsterdam on a customizable guided tour. Discover picturesque canals, historic landmarks like the West India Company headquarters and the Homomonument, all while enjoying accessible routes. With a professional guide, immerse yourself in the unique charm of this vibrant neighborhood, tailored to your preferences.

tours.name: Accessible Tour Van Gogh Museum
tours.description: Experience the brilliance of Vincent Van Gogh in a personalized, one-hour guided tour of the Van Gogh Museum. Explore over 200 paintings and 400 drawings, enriched by insights from your art history graduate guide. Enjoy accessible routes and tailored experiences that make this an unforgettable journey through the life of a legendary artist.

tours.name: Kids - Accessible Tour Van Gogh Museum
tours.description: Embark on an exciting treasure hunt at the Van Gogh Museum in Amsterdam, where you’ll play detective to uncover the traces of a stolen masterpiece. This engaging activity, perfect for families with young children, combines riddles and fascinating stories about Van Gogh, making art exploration both fun and memorable.

tours.name: Accessible Tour Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Experience the rich tapestry of Dutch culture at the Rijksmuseum with a private tour led by an art historian. Discover masterpieces from the Dutch Golden Age, including Rembrandt's iconic Night Watch, and uncover hidden gems in a captivating exploration of 17th-century art. Tailor your journey to your interests for an unforgettable visit.

tours.name: FREE TOUR Amsterdam,"La Ciudad Más Tolerante Del Mundo"
tours.description: Embark on a 2.5-hour tour that unveils the quirky essence of Dutch society! Explore iconic spots like coffeeshops and the Red Light District, while uncovering the city’s hidden secrets with a humorous twist. Enhance your experience with a virtual map to navigate before and after your adventure!

tours.name: AMSTERDAM: MOLINOS Y CAMPIÑA
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 6-hour journey through North Holland, exploring the charming towns of Zaanse Schans, Edam, Marken, and Volendam. Discover the rich culture, intriguing history, and unique curiosities of the Netherlands, all just a short drive from Amsterdam. This excursion promises unforgettable insights into Dutch heritage.

tours.name: BIKE TOUR
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam on a traditional bike during this 2.5-hour guided tour. Navigate the historic city center safely while exploring iconic neighborhoods like Jordaan and Vondelpark. Discover hidden gems and local favorites, making unforgettable memories as you pedal through a city designed for two-wheeled adventures.

tours.name: AMSTERDAM: ARTE EN BICI CON FERRY A NDSM
tours.description: Embark on a 2.5-hour bike tour through Amsterdam, the cultural capital of Europe. Discover iconic artists and urban hotspots, explore the artistic district, and delve into the city's rich history. A local guide will unveil the secrets of the artistic underground, making this an unforgettable journey through "The Most Tolerant City in the World."

tours.name: AMSTERDAM: A TRAVÉS DE LA MÚSICA
tours.description: Embark on a 2.5-hour musical journey through Amsterdam, exploring its rich history and vibrant culture. Led by a conservatory musician, discover the sounds of pirates, the golden age, and iconic artists while visiting live music venues. Experience the city like never before, with a unique blend of music and storytelling.

tours.name: Tour a pé por Amsterdam e passeio de barco pelos canais
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour tour of Amsterdam's historic center, where you'll explore its rich past from a fishing village to a commercial hub. Discover iconic sites like the Central Station and the Jewish Quarter, while savoring traditional Dutch chocolates and cheeses, leaving you enchanted and eager to return.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Body Worlds
tours.description: Experience a unique one-hour canal cruise combined with the captivating BODY WORLDS exhibition in Amsterdam. Created by Dr. Gunther von Hagens, this internationally acclaimed showcase of the human body has fascinated over 40 million visitors since 1995, making it a memorable journey into the wonders of human anatomy.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Red Light Secrets Museum
tours.description: Embark on a unique 1-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to the Red Light Secrets Museum, the world's first prostitution museum. Explore a historic brothel, uncover the haunting tale of the infamous Chinese Annie, and delve into the captivating stories of sex workers, revealing the secrets of this ancient profession.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam with a one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to the iconic Rijksmuseum. Explore over 8,000 masterpieces, including works by Vermeer, Rembrandt, and Van Gogh, immersing yourself in the rich art and history of the Netherlands. A perfect blend of culture and scenic beauty awaits!

tours.name: Heineken Experience + Canal Cruise Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Discover the rich heritage of Heineken® at the iconic brewery in Amsterdam. This unique experience offers insights into the brewing process, innovative practices, and the brand's storied history. Learn the art of tasting and savoring Heineken® like never before in a historic setting that celebrates its legacy.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + The Amsterdam Dungeon
tours.description: Experience the dark history of Amsterdam with a thrilling one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to The Amsterdam Dungeon. Encounter the chilling tales of witch hunts, torture, and executions through immersive theater, stunning sets, and professional actors, making history come alive in an unforgettable way.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + This is Holland
tours.description: Embark on a breathtaking one-hour canal cruise combined with the immersive experience of THIS IS HOLLAND. Discover the stunning beauty of the Netherlands through a captivating journey that allows you to truly feel the essence of this remarkable country, offering a unique perspective you won't forget.

tours.name: Beginner Embroidery Workshop 1.0
tours.description: Master embroidery in just 3 hours with expert guidance. Learn basic stitches, get all materials included, and take home your tools to keep creating. Perfect for beginners eager to start stitching.

tours.name: The Connoisseur's Taste
tours.description: Indulge in a personalized Amsterdam food adventure, crafted around your passions—whether savoring rooftop seafood, exploring Dutch spirits, or blending whiskey with art—created with top local experts just for you.

tours.name: Cleansday Plastic Fishing
tours.description: Join a lively canal adventure on September 19, 2025, as you fish for plastic, turn waste into treasure, and help make Amsterdam cleaner—all while enjoying a fun, community-filled day on the water.

tours.name: Amsterdam private tour to Keukenhof, tulip fields and windmills
tours.description: Explore Holland's spring magic with vibrant tulip fields, iconic windmills, and the stunning Keukenhof garden. Small group, flexible stops, and exclusive viewpoints make this 8-hour tour unforgettable.

tours.name: BROEK IN WATERLAND & ZAANSCHE SCHANS
tours.description: Embark on a captivating full-day Dutch Heritage Tour to Broek in Waterland and Zaanse Schans. Discover charming streets and historic wooden homes, then explore an open-air museum filled with windmills and traditional crafts. Experience clog making, cheese sampling, and breathtaking scenery, creating unforgettable memories in the heart of the Netherlands.

tours.name: Wheel of Wonders | May 15
tours.description: Experience an extraordinary evening of magic where the audience spins a wheel to determine the deck, leading to unique, interactive performances by three skilled magicians. With only 16 seats per show, this intimate setting promises unforgettable moments of wonder and participation. Join the fun and shape the magic!

tours.name: Sundeck Cruiser - Open Boat Private Canal Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s historic canals on a sleek open-sundeck boat, soaking in iconic sights and hidden gems. Local skippers share stories as you explore narrow passages and secret spots in this personalized cruise.

tours.name: Queer Cannabis Tour
tours.description: Join a vibrant queer-led tour exploring Amsterdam’s real cannabis history, science, and culture. Discover safe spaces, break stereotypes, and celebrate freedom through stories, sights, and insider knowledge.

tours.name: The Champagne Diamond Surprise
tours.description: Experience the Champagne Surprise Tour at Royal Coster Diamonds, where guests enjoy a glass of champagne containing either a real diamond or a cubic zirconia. With expert guidance, learn to distinguish between the two while exploring Europe's largest diamond collection. A unique and memorable evening awaits, complete with a stunning keepsake!

tours.name: Biglietto ingresso Casa di Anne Frank + introduzione con guida italiana
tours.description: Experience the poignant history of Anne Frank's secret refuge with a guided introduction that brings her story to life. Enjoy priority access and a 20-minute overview of Anne and her family's journey, followed by a self-guided tour with an audio guide, allowing you to explore at your own pace.

tours.name: Masterclass Cucina Povera
tours.description: Learn to cook authentic Italian dishes in a fun 5-hour workshop in Amsterdam. Make fresh pasta, classic focaccia, and Torta della Nonna, all with simple ingredients and expert tips from a nonna-style chef.

tours.name: Cucina Povera - 4 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in 'Cucina Povera' in the heart of Amsterdam, where you'll transform simple ingredients into exquisite Italian dishes. Enjoy a hands-on cooking workshop, learn to make fresh pasta, and enhance your culinary skills. Perfect for team building, this experience promises delicious food and unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Cucina Povera - 3 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in 'Cucina Povera' in the heart of Amsterdam, where you'll transform simple ingredients into exquisite Italian dishes. Enjoy a hands-on cooking workshop, learn to make fresh pasta, and enhance your culinary skills while bonding with your team. A unique experience filled with flavor and creativity awaits!

tours.name: Cucina Povera - 3 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in 'Cucina Povera' in the heart of Amsterdam, where you'll transform simple ingredients into exquisite dishes. Enjoy a hands-on cooking workshop, learn to make fresh pasta, and savor a delightful Italian menu. Perfect for team building, this experience promises culinary skills and unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Classique Française - 3 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in the art of French cuisine during this 4-hour workshop in Amsterdam. Master classic dishes like steak tartare and entrecôte with bearnaise sauce, culminating in a delightful tarte Tatin. Perfect for enhancing culinary skills and fostering team spirit, this experience promises to tantalize your taste buds and inspire creativity.

tours.name: Taste of Brews & Bites Public Tour
tours.description: Taste 52 Dutch beers at a historic bar, learn Amsterdam’s beer stories, and enjoy a secret sip at a lively 1895 venue supporting social causes—all in 3.5 hours of flavorful exploration.

tours.name: Cucina Povera -  Request / Offerte
tours.description: Experience the art of 'Cucina Povera' in Amsterdam with a unique cooking workshop for groups of up to 120. Over four hours, learn to create delicious three- or four-course meals, including fresh pasta and traditional desserts, while enhancing your culinary skills in a fun, interactive environment.

tours.name: Classique Française - Request / Offerte
tours.description: Join a captivating 4-hour Classique Français cooking workshop in the heart of Amsterdam, where you'll master the art of classic French cuisine. Explore iconic dishes like Soupe à l’Oignon and Tarte Tatin, while enhancing your culinary skills. This unique experience promises delicious flavors and unforgettable memories for groups of 20 or more.

tours.name: Kingsday Cruise - Single Tickets
tours.description: Celebrate Kings Day in style with a unique 3-hour boat party on Amsterdam's picturesque canals! Enjoy complimentary drinks, a lively sound system, and a fun captain as you and your friends create unforgettable memories on this vibrant national holiday. Don't miss the chance to experience the ultimate Kingsday celebration!

tours.name: Jewish history tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam’s profound Jewish heritage on a private walking tour through the historic Jewish Quarter. Visit significant sites like the Portuguese Synagogue and Holocaust Memorial, while an expert guide shares captivating stories of resilience and culture. Customize your experience with options for a canal cruise or Kosher dining for a truly memorable day.

tours.name: Highlights of Amsterdam walking tour
tours.description: Embark on a private walking tour of Amsterdam, where you'll explore iconic landmarks like Dam Square and the Royal Palace. Stroll along picturesque canals, uncover hidden courtyards, and delve into the city's rich history and vibrant culture with an expert guide, making for an unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Amsterdam Light Festival - Open Boot - Zonder Drankjes
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals, cozy under blankets, past iconic landmarks like NEMO, Magere Brug, and Westerkerk. A magical water journey showcasing stunning light art and historic beauty.

tours.name: Walk-in Pattern Drawing class
tours.description: Master pattern drafting in just 8 sessions, creating your own fitted blocks and personalized designs. Gain expert guidance, essential skills, and confidence to craft perfect patterns tailored to your body.

tours.name: Private Group Street Art Walking Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s vibrant Jordaan neighborhood, uncover hidden street art, discuss its meaning, and create your own graffiti masterpiece in just 2 hours. A colorful, interactive art adventure awaits.

tours.name: Arabische kookworkshop
tours.description: Experience the rich flavors and aromas of the Middle East in this captivating Arabic cooking workshop! Immerse yourself in the enchanting world of aromatic spices and vibrant dishes, culminating in a shared feast that tantalizes your senses and embodies the warm hospitality of the region. A culinary journey not to be missed!

tours.name: Solo Traveler
tours.description: Join a flexible tour designed for solo travelers. We find the best available time for you, with easy booking and free cancellations. Just choose your date, fill out the form, and enjoy a hassle-free adventure.

tours.name: Keukenhof and Tulip Fields
tours.description: Embark on a private tour to Europe's largest tulip garden, where you'll be captivated by stunning floral displays and themed gardens. Enjoy a luxurious ride, a delightful lunch at a countryside estate, and gain insights into tulip cultivation and the rich history of Dutch tulips for an unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Giethoorn venice of the North private tour
tours.description: Embark on a private tour to Giethoorn, the enchanting "Dutch Venice." Glide through serene canals on a traditional boat, stroll past charming thatched-roof cottages, and soak in the tranquil, car-free atmosphere. With leisure time to explore local cafés and hidden gems, this experience promises unforgettable memories in a storybook setting.

tours.name: Three cities in one day Delft, The Hague and Leiden
tours.description: Starting at €1120 • Maximum 9 pax • Historic Treasures of Delft, The Hague & Leiden

tours.name: Dutch countryside and Windmills tour
tours.description: Discover the enchanting Dutch countryside on a journey through Zaanse Schans, where iconic windmills and traditional wooden houses showcase the nation's heritage. Visit local cheese farms and charming fishing villages, savoring authentic Dutch culture while strolling along picturesque canals and historic streets. This experience promises unforgettable memories and delightful discoveries.

tours.name: Natural Dyeing Workshop: Eco-Print Fabric by Atelier Nachtvlinder
tours.description: Transform plain fabrics into stunning eco-prints using natural pigments, guided by expert Annastasia. Leave with 3 meters of personalized textiles and a clear creative vision in a mindful, nature-inspired workshop.

tours.name: Street Art & Alternative Walking Tour at NDSM
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s vibrant street art scene, graffiti halls, and underground culture on a 2-hour tour. Discover squats, hidden bars, and local secrets with passionate guides who make you feel like a native.

tours.name: Study Tours
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s innovative green solutions, from renewable energy to water management, on a 2.5-hour tour showcasing how the city leads in sustainability and smart urban living.

tours.name: Shared Open Sundeck Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s hidden canals on a cozy, open-sundeck boat. Enjoy intimate views of historic architecture, narrow passages, and local stories from friendly skippers in a 60-minute adventure.

tours.name: Company Winter Fishing Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a cozy winter canal cruise to fish plastic waste, sip warm drinks, and enjoy peaceful scenery. With blankets, a skipper, and a fun competition, it’s an eco-friendly adventure you won’t forget.

tours.name: Fietstour + Rondvaart (gedeeld)
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s highlights with a friendly guide, then relax on a scenic boat tour of the canals and IJ. Perfect for families, this 2-hour bike and 1-hour boat combo reveals the city’s charm from land and water.

tours.name: Private Food Tour
tours.description: Embark on a delightful 2-hour Amsterdam Food Tour, starting at the vibrant Albert Cuyp Market. Savor 8 to 10 unique Dutch delicacies, from poffertjes to stroopwafels, and indulge in local craft beers. This culinary adventure promises a memorable taste of Amsterdam's rich food culture—come hungry for an unforgettable experience!

tours.name: Vaar voor de Favela
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s enchanting canals at night, sipping unlimited drinks while admiring illuminated landmarks like the Magere Brug and Anne Frank House. Each ticket supports children in Rio’s favelas, providing education and safety. Enjoy a memorable boat ride that combines stunning sights with making a meaningful difference.

tours.name: Italiaanse kookworkshop
tours.description: Experience the authentic flavors of Italy in this unique cooking workshop in Amsterdam! Learn refined techniques from Italian chefs as you create classic dishes like fresh pizzas, homemade pasta, and rosemary focaccia. Enjoy a delightful evening filled with passion for food, accompanied by exquisite Italian wines. La dolce vita awaits!

tours.name: Free Tour de Haarlem
tours.description: Un paseo por Haarlem revela su historia, cultura y secretos mejor guardados, desde molinos y cárceles hasta casas históricas, en una visita llena de encanto y descubrimientos en solo unas horas.

tours.name: Beginner Lingerie Workshop: Bralette
tours.description: Create your own stylish bandana in a fun, beginner-friendly crochet workshop. Learn stitches, choose colors, and leave with a personalized accessory after 3 hours of expert guidance and relaxing crafting.

tours.name: Beginner Lingerie Workshop: Panties or Thong
tours.description: Try crochet with a fun, beginner-friendly workshop—learn stitches, pick your colors, and make a stylish bandana in just 3 hours. All materials included, plus expert guidance and relaxing vibes.

tours.name: Amsterdam Magic Show
tours.description: Step into a lively 2-hour magic and comedy show in Amsterdam, featuring top international magicians, hilarious tricks, and an afterparty. Located near Jordaan, it's a night of wonder you won't forget.

tours.name: Japanese open group cooking class
tours.description: Join a 3.5-hour Japanese cooking class in Amsterdam, where you’ll craft sushi, sashimi, and more based on your dietary needs. Cook, dine, and learn in a friendly group setting with expert guidance and authentic flavors.

tours.name: Public Cheese Market Shopping Walk & Craft Beer Workshop
tours.description: Taste a variety of Dutch cheeses on a 3-hour walk through Amsterdam’s markets, then savor them with four unique beers at Troost Brewery. Learn cheese secrets, pairings, and enjoy a flavorful, fun experience.

tours.name: Beginner Embroidery Workshop 2.0
tours.description: Enhance your embroidery skills in a lively 3-hour workshop, mastering six new stitches with expert guidance. Create a beautiful sampler and boost your confidence—perfect for crafters ready to elevate their stitching game.

tours.name: [Attic Collective] Big Game Comedy Show (formerly Boom @ Night)
tours.description: Dive into an hour of wild laughs with sketch, stand-up, music, and surprise comedy legends at Boom Chicago’s attic. Perfect for night owls craving hilarious, weird fun—grab your ticket and join the party.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Amsterdam Icebar
tours.description: Experience the thrill of Amsterdam's Icebar, where temperatures plunge to -10°C. Enjoy a unique drink served in a glass made of ice and immerse yourself in an Arctic atmosphere. This unforgettable one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to the Icebar is a must-do adventure in the heart of the city.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Ripley's
tours.description: Experience a captivating one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to Ripley's Believe It or Not! in Amsterdam. Discover hundreds of rare and unusual artifacts while engaging in incredible interactive exhibits that promise to astonish and entertain, making for an unforgettable adventure in this vibrant city.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Van Gogh Museum
tours.description: Embark on a captivating one-hour canal cruise in Amsterdam, followed by an exploration of the Van Gogh Museum. Discover the largest collection of Vincent van Gogh's masterpieces, including iconic works like "The Potato Eaters," "Almond Blossom," and "The Sower," making for an unforgettable artistic journey.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Madame Tussauds
tours.description: Experience a one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to the world’s largest wax museum, Madame Tussauds. Enjoy the unique blend of scenic views and lifelike celebrity figures, making for an unforgettable day filled with culture and entertainment. Discover the magic of iconic personalities up close!

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + NEMO Science Museum
tours.description: Embark on a thrilling one-hour canal cruise, followed by an exploration of the NEMO Science Museum. This unique experience combines the beauty of Amsterdam's waterways with interactive exhibits that ignite curiosity and wonder, making it a memorable adventure for all ages. Discover science and technology in an engaging setting!

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Straat Museum
tours.description: Embark on a captivating one-hour canal cruise, where stunning views of the city unfold before you. Afterward, immerse yourself in the vibrant exhibits at the Straat Museum, showcasing street art and culture. This unique combination offers an unforgettable exploration of urban beauty and creativity, perfect for art and adventure lovers alike.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Moco Museum
tours.description: Embark on a captivating one-hour canal cruise paired with a visit to the Moco Museum. Experience the stunning views of the city from the water while immersing yourself in contemporary art and culture. This unique combination offers a memorable exploration of both Amsterdam's scenic beauty and its vibrant artistic scene.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Johan Cruijff Arena Stadium Tour
tours.description: Experience a thrilling one-hour canal cruise followed by an exclusive tour of the iconic Johan Cruijff Arena. Discover the beauty of the waterways while soaking in the vibrant atmosphere, then step into the world of football legends as you explore the stadium's rich history and behind-the-scenes secrets.

tours.name: Small Group Tour: From Amsterdam, Keukenhof (tulips), Zaanse Schans, Volendam by Mini-Van
tours.description: Escape the crowds and dive into authentic Dutch charm with a small-group tour. Wander peaceful windmills, vibrant tulip fields, charming fishing villages, and enjoy local treats—an intimate journey into the Netherlands’ soul.

tours.name: SAIL 2025 - Luxe Stadsrondvaart - Drankjes Optioneel
tours.description: Experience the thrill of SAIL 2025 aboard Mokumboot, cruising through Amsterdam's iconic waterways. Marvel at the vibrant Open Havenfront, the historic Scheepvaartmuseum, and the charming Oudeschans. Glide along the Amstel, passing under picturesque bridges, for an unforgettable blend of tradition and adventure in the heart of the city.

tours.name: Intimate Light Festival Cruise (Max 6 Guests)​
tours.description: Join a cozy 90-minute canal cruise with local guides sharing hidden gems, personal stories, and quirky facts. Enjoy drinks, Dutch treats, and a vintage Polaroid as you explore Amsterdam’s quieter, authentic side away from crowds.

tours.name: Pattern Drawing Workshop Series 2.0 - Summer Edition
tours.description: Create your perfect wardrobe with custom patterns in this hands-on workshop. Learn to draft, fit, and adjust patterns for your style, finishing with personalized blocks you can reuse for years.

tours.name: Ghent Bike Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Ghent’s inspiring transformation from car city to cycling hub, exploring innovative infrastructure, landmark streets, and bold policies that doubled bike use—an eye-opening journey into urban mobility.

tours.name: Rondvaart Koningsdag 2026
tours.description: Celebrate Koningsdag with a lively 90-minute boat cruise through Amsterdam’s iconic canals, soaking up festive vibes, colorful sights, and hidden gems. Perfect for a memorable, fun-filled day on the water.

tours.name: Anne Frank General Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on a poignant walking tour through Anne Frank's neighborhood, tracing her daily routes to school and favorite spots. Discover lesser-known wartime stories and insights about her sister Margot. This immersive experience offers a unique glimpse into their lives, all while enjoying the vibrant surroundings of Amsterdam.

tours.name: 27 April - Koningsdag Party Cruise over de grachten
tours.description: Celebrate Koningsdag in style with a 1.5-2 hour boat tour through Amsterdam’s lively canals. Enjoy live music, unlimited drinks, and the best views of the festivities—an unforgettable way to experience the city’s orange-filled joy.

tours.name: Sparta Granny Handbrake
tours.description: Discover the city like never before by renting a unique omafiets! With its open frame for easy access and a convenient rear rack for your belongings, this bike is perfect for exploration. Enjoy the freedom of cycling with included lights and locks, making your adventure both safe and memorable.

tours.name: Tour privato Amsterdam in bicicletta
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s iconic canals, historic houses, and vibrant neighborhoods on a private 2-hour bike tour. Pedal past Vondelpark, Leidseplein, and the Rijksmuseum with a local guide—an authentic city experience.

tours.name: Plasticvissen Scheepvaartmuseum Amsterdam
tours.description: Kids dive into museum learning then race plastic-fishing boats to collect trash and unique items, competing for prizes. A fun, eco-friendly adventure combining education and water fun in just 2 hours.

tours.name: Pizza Cruise
tours.description: Experience the enchanting canals of Amsterdam on a private 90-minute cruise, where you’ll savor delicious pizza and enjoy unlimited drinks. Glide past iconic landmarks with a knowledgeable guide, uncovering the city's rich history while celebrating with friends and family in a comfortable, eco-friendly boat. A truly memorable adventure awaits!

tours.name: The Rose Séance Experiment
tours.description: Join a haunting 2.5-hour séance in historic Amsterdam, where spirits and mysteries come alive. Communicate with the past, enjoy drinks, guided tours, and a spirit photo in a chilling, unforgettable setting near Jordaan.

tours.name: Pure Dutch - 4 courses
tours.description: Experience the essence of Dutch cuisine in a vibrant 4-hour cooking workshop in Amsterdam. Discover traditional dishes like Zaanse mustard soup and Texels lamb, while enhancing your culinary skills. Enjoy the warmth of Dutch hospitality, perfect for team building, and customize your experience with fun add-ons for a memorable day.

tours.name: Pure Dutch - 4 courses
tours.description: 4 Course Menu • Dutch • 4 Hours • minimum 12 per booking

tours.name: Cucina Povera - Italian
tours.description: Experience the art of 'Cucina Povera' in Amsterdam, where simple ingredients become exquisite dishes. Perfect for groups of up to 120, this immersive cooking workshop offers three- or four-course meals and the chance to master fresh pasta making. Enhance your skills while enjoying a unique culinary adventure!

tours.name: Pure Dutch - 3 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in the rich flavors of Dutch cuisine during this 4-hour cooking workshop in the heart of Amsterdam. Discover traditional dishes like Zaanse mustard soup and Texels lamb, while enhancing your culinary skills. Enjoy a unique blend of cooking, team building, and the warmth of Dutch hospitality.

tours.name: Pure Dutch - 3 courses
tours.description: 3 Course Menu • Dutch • 4 Hours • minimum 12 per booking

tours.name: Koningsvissen Rotterdam
tours.description: Join a lively canal cleanup on April 28th, sailing with plastic fishing boats to collect waste, enjoy drinks, and help the environment. All gear provided, fun guaranteed—perfect for a hangover recovery!

tours.name: Masterclass Pure Dutch
tours.description: Taste authentic Dutch flavors in a 5-hour chef-led class in Amsterdam. Make and enjoy hearty dishes like mustard soup, Texel lamb, and grandma’s apple pie—perfect for sharing with friends and family.

tours.name: King's Day Boat party
tours.description: Celebrate King's Day on a lively boat with unlimited drinks, good vibes, and your own weed. Dance, relax, and enjoy 3 hours of festive fun on the water.

tours.name: Lingerie Workshop Series 2.0: Wired Bra (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own underwire bra and matching lingerie in a fun, hands-on workshop. Learn expert techniques, craft a perfect fit, and leave with a beautiful, custom-made set. All materials included—sewing skills recommended.

tours.name: Five-hour Countryside & Windmills Tour
tours.description: Escape the city on a private 5-hour tour of the Dutch countryside, featuring hotel pick-up and drop-off. Discover the enchanting Zaanse Schans with its iconic windmills and local crafts, while exploring picturesque villages and lush landscapes. Enjoy personalized insights from your guide, blending history, nature, and Dutch traditions in one unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Four-hour Private Keukenhof Tour
tours.description: Experience the vibrant beauty of Keukenhof Gardens on a private 4-hour tour. Enjoy convenient hotel pick-up and drop-off as you explore stunning tulip fields and floral displays. With a knowledgeable guide sharing insights into the region's horticultural history, this tour promises unforgettable sights and memorable moments in Holland's springtime paradise.

tours.name: Five-hour Private Keukenhof Tour
tours.description: Experience a private 5-hour escape to the stunning Keukenhof Gardens and the picturesque Dutch countryside. Enjoy breathtaking floral displays, explore vibrant tulip fields, and visit charming villages and windmills. With hotel pick-up and a knowledgeable guide, this springtime adventure promises unforgettable sights and insights in Holland.

tours.name: Private Tour to Efteling Theme Park
tours.description: Embark on a magical journey to Efteling Theme Park, where fairy tales come to life! Enjoy a full day of enchanting attractions, thrilling rides, and whimsical shows, all with convenient hotel pick-up and drop-off. This unforgettable adventure is perfect for families, couples, and theme park enthusiasts seeking excitement and wonder.

tours.name: Canal Pride Party Boat
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals on a cozy electric boat, sipping drinks and soaking in stunning art installations. Hear stories, learn city secrets, and enjoy the vibrant festival atmosphere from a warm, comfortable seat.

tours.name: Beginner Crafting Course 1.0
tours.description: Join our flexible 4-lesson crafting courses in Amsterdam to learn sewing or various crafts like knitting, embroidery, crochet, or macramé. Create unique items with expert guidance and choose your schedule.

tours.name: Privé Wallenwandeling
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s Wallen with an expert guide, uncovering its history, Chinatown, Oude Kerk, and the smallest alley. Walk through vibrant streets, learn its transformation, and enjoy a local café break.

tours.name: Lingerie Workshop Series: Bundle  (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create two custom lingerie sets over 14 evenings with expert guidance, choosing styles and sizes. All materials included—leave with handmade bras, briefs, or thongs in a fun, supportive workshop.

tours.name: Lingerie Workshop Series 1.0: Bralette (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own lingerie in a fun 7-day workshop with expert Ulara. Make a cotton briefs and a triangle bralette, then upgrade to underwire styles. All materials included—leave with a custom set you made yourself.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop Series: Basics 2.0 - Summer Edition
tours.description: Join our advanced sewing workshop to master techniques like pleats, pockets, bias binding, and zippers. Over 8 sessions, create samples with expert guidance, a detailed booklet, and all materials provided. Perfect for confident beginners.

tours.name: Amsterdam Light Festival Private Tour -  75 min - Max 10 guests
tours.description: Enjoy a 75-minute journey through Amsterdam Light Festival’s stunning light art, accompanied by drinks like gluhwein, wine, beer, and soda. Perfect for up to 10 guests to share this magical, illuminated experience.

tours.name: Private Group Silent Disco Tour
tours.description: Dance through Amsterdam’s lively streets with a silent disco, grooving to your favorite tunes on high-tech headsets. Sing, dance, and make memories in the city’s most vibrant spots—fun guaranteed!

tours.name: Private Giethoorn Daytour
tours.description: Discover the enchanting village of Giethoorn on a private 7-hour tour, complete with hotel pick-up. Known as the "Dutch Venice," this car-free paradise features charming thatched-roof houses and serene canals. Enjoy a private boat tour and leisurely explore the village's quaint footpaths and local boutiques for a truly memorable experience.

tours.name: Private Roundtrip Amsterdam to Brussels
tours.description: Embark on a private 11-hour adventure through Brussels, where history meets charm. Discover iconic landmarks like the Grand Place and Atomium, savor delicious Belgian chocolates and waffles, and wander historic streets. With flexible free time for shopping and dining, this tour offers a personalized experience of Belgium's vibrant capital.

tours.name: Private Roundtrip Amsterdam to Bruges
tours.description: Embark on a private 12-hour adventure to Bruges, where you'll wander through charming cobblestone streets and admire stunning medieval architecture. Discover iconic sites like Markt Square and the Belfry Tower, while enjoying free time for shopping, scenic boat rides, and indulging in delicious Belgian treats. Experience Bruges' magic at your leisure!

tours.name: Private tour - Designer Outlet
tours.description: Experience a luxurious day of shopping on a private 10-hour tour to a premier Designer Outlet. Enjoy comfortable travel with hotel pick-up and drop-off, while exploring high-end fashion, exclusive discounts, and stylish cafés. Perfect for fashion enthusiasts and bargain hunters, this stress-free adventure promises unforgettable finds!

tours.name: Private Delft, The Hague & Rotterdam Tour
tours.description: Embark on a private 8-hour tour exploring the enchanting cities of Delft, The Hague, and Rotterdam. Enjoy the historic charm of Delft's canals, marvel at The Hague's iconic landmarks, and experience Rotterdam's cutting-edge architecture. This journey offers a captivating blend of history, culture, and modern innovation in a single unforgettable day.

tours.name: Private Roundtrip Amsterdam to Antwerp
tours.description: Discover the vibrant charm of Antwerp on a private 10-hour tour, where history meets modern creativity. Visit iconic sites like the Cathedral of Our Lady and Antwerp Central Station, enjoy world-class art at the Rubens House, and indulge in shopping and dining at your leisure in this culturally rich port city.

tours.name: Private Cologne City Tour
tours.description: Experience the historic charm and vibrant culture of Cologne on a private 12-hour tour. Marvel at the breathtaking Cologne Cathedral, wander through the picturesque Old Town, and enjoy the lively Rhine Promenade. With free time for shopping and savoring local cuisine, this trip is a must for culture enthusiasts!

tours.name: Lingerie Workshop Series 1.0: Bralette - Summer Edition
tours.description: Create your own lingerie in engaging workshops with expert guidance. Over several sessions, craft bras, briefs, or thongs using organic cotton, patterns, and your style—leave with a personalized set you made yourself.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop Series: Basics 1.0 - Summer Edition
tours.description: Master sewing in just 8 days with expert guidance. Learn to make perfect darts, pockets, zippers, and collars while creating samples. Includes tools, materials, and a helpful booklet—perfect for beginners.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop Series: Basics Bundle - Summer Edition
tours.description: Master sewing in 16 guided lessons, from seams to zippers and pockets. Create samples, learn key techniques, and get expert tips. Perfect for beginners eager to build skills and craft professional-looking garments.

tours.name: Lingerie Series: Bundle - Summer Edition
tours.description: Create two custom lingerie sets over 14 or 6 sessions with expert guidance. Choose styles, learn sewing basics, and take home your own handmade bras and underwear. Book both courses for a special discount.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop Series: Basics Intermediate (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Master sewing in 8 focused sessions, creating samples like pockets, zippers, and collars. Gain expert guidance, a helpful booklet, and hands-on practice to boost your skills from beginner to confident sewer.

tours.name: ECNP Fietshuur
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam like a local, visiting iconic neighborhoods with ease. Rent a bike from Yellow Bike, official partner for ERS 2025, and enjoy eco-friendly, scenic rides right from RAI Amsterdam.

tours.name: Beach Tour
tours.description: It looks like the original description is missing or incomplete ("afgs"). Please provide the full activity details so I can craft an engaging summary for you.

tours.name: Best Burger Deal
tours.description: Indulge in a delightful culinary experience with a mouthwatering burger paired with crispy fries. This combination promises to satisfy your cravings and elevate your meal to a new level of enjoyment. Perfect for food lovers seeking a classic yet irresistible dining option.

tours.name: Lesbian Show
tours.description: Experience an exhilarating 15-minute strip show that promises to captivate and entertain. This unique performance combines artistry and allure, offering a memorable glimpse into the world of dance and seduction. Perfect for those seeking a thrilling and unforgettable experience, this show is sure to leave you wanting more.

tours.name: Roly Poly Strip
tours.description: Experience an exhilarating 15-minute strip show that promises to captivate and entertain. This unique performance blends artistry and allure, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Perfect for those seeking a thrilling escape, this show is designed to leave you breathless and wanting more, making it a must-see event for adventurous spirits.

tours.name: Sexy Maid / Sexy Butler
tours.description: Experience an exhilarating 15-minute strip show that promises to captivate and entertain. This unique performance combines artistry and allure, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Perfect for those seeking a thrilling escape, this show is designed to leave you breathless and wanting more. Don't miss this chance to indulge in a memorable experience.

tours.name: Sexy Waitress / Sexy Butler
tours.description: Experience an unforgettable hour with a naked waitress, blending charm and allure in a unique setting. This captivating encounter promises to elevate your event, creating a memorable atmosphere filled with excitement and intrigue. Perfect for adding a touch of fun and sophistication to your gathering.

tours.name: Murder Mystery Only Game
tours.description: Dive into a world of suspense with the Murder Mystery Game, where your detective skills will be put to the ultimate test. Collaborate with your group to unravel clues and solve the captivating mystery, creating an unforgettable experience filled with intrigue and excitement.

tours.name: Pro Wrestling Holland Live x Boom Chicago
tours.description: Get ready to RUMBLE as Pro Wrestling Holland returns to Boom Chicago on February 27, 2026! Witness shocking twists, intense matches, and electrifying moments in this unforgettable live show. Book your seat now!

tours.name: Private Christmas Road Trip: From Amsterdam to Brussels Market
tours.description: Enjoy a luxurious, stress-free Christmas road trip from Amsterdam to Brussels with festive treats, captivating stories, VR visuals, and holiday magic at Winter Wonders—an unforgettable holiday adventure for all.

tours.name: Boom Gone Country
tours.description: Join a lively country dance party in Amsterdam with real line dances, fun costumes, and a welcoming crowd. Feel the energy of Nashville-style music and dance your heart out in a night you won’t forget.

tours.name: Shot of Improv
tours.description: Join a wild, unpredictable comedy night where your ideas fuel the chaos. Start with half-price drinks, then dive into spontaneous laughs and game challenges—nothing's planned, everything's possible.

tours.name: VOS in de VS – Michiel Vos
tours.description: Join Dutch-American journalist Michiel Vos for a lively evening of sharp insights, personal stories, and humor about American culture, politics, and identity—offering a unique inside look at the U.S. from someone living between two worlds.

tours.name: [Community Night] Izzy Goessens "Crumble"
tours.description: Join Izzy’s hilarious debut as she navigates online dating chaos, tears, and awkward moments. Expect laughs, vulnerability, and wild stories about love, grief, and making poor decisions in a world of digital romance.

tours.name: [Academy] Workshop with Elf Lyons: How to Make your Dream Show (One Day Intensive)
tours.description: Unlock your creative potential with a relaxed, fun improv rap workshop that turns fear into freedom, helping you find your flow, craft punchlines, and enjoy making music in a stress-free environment.

tours.name: Naco Ladino – Carlos Ballarta
tours.description: Laugh, think, and challenge norms with Carlos Ballarta’s sharp humor on Latin American culture, identity, and modern life. A bold, provocative show in Spanish that will make you reflect and laugh out loud.

tours.name: Nanutria en Amsterdam
tours.description: Venezuelan comedian Nanutria delivers a fresh, improvisational stand-up show filled with sharp irony, tackling everyday, complex, and silly topics. Each performance is unique, hilarious, and perfect for Spanish speakers.

tours.name: 1637 Dagen van Onrecht
tours.description: Joseph Oubelkas's gripping story of resilience: 1637 days in a Moroccan cell, choosing growth over hatred, and rediscovering freedom through hope, humor, and forgiveness. An emotional journey of human strength and renewal.

tours.name: Owner's Table
tours.description: Join a curated evening at the Owner’s Table with great seats, snacks, bubbles, and surprises. Sip cava, enjoy tasty bitterballen, then settle in for an unforgettable comedy show in Amsterdam’s best theater.

tours.name: Full Body Thinking LIVE – met Wouter de Jong
tours.description: Wouter de Jong onthult hoe je lichaam de sleutel is tot echte rust en focus. Met humor en wetenschap laat hij zien dat ontspanning begint in je lijf, niet in je hoofd. Een avond vol inzicht en inspiratie.

tours.name: Angelo Duro "Ho tre belle notizie"
tours.description: Angelo Duro’s latest show, “Ho tre belle notizie,” delivers his signature sharp humor with three surprising stories. Expect laughs, honesty, and bold insights that will leave you talking long after the curtain falls.

tours.name: Take the Cannoli: The Movie Quiz
tours.description: Laugh your way through 30 years of comedy with quick improv games, hilarious scenes, and audience suggestions, all while enjoying drinks. A lively, fast-paced night of fun, surprises, and nonstop laughter.

tours.name: Pattern Drawing Workshop Series 1.0 - Summer Edition
tours.description: Create perfect, custom-fit patterns in just four days. Learn to draft, adjust, and design your own clothing blocks with expert guidance—turn your ideas into tailored garments you can make yourself.

tours.name: Epic Rap Battles of History
tours.description: Join the hilarious rap battles of history live in Amsterdam, where legendary figures clash in witty, high-energy showdowns featuring stars like Weird Al and Snoop Dogg. Don't miss this epic, one-of-a-kind event!

tours.name: Watch the World Cup at Boom Chicago!
tours.description: Watch Euro or World Cup matches on massive screens at Boom Chicago. Enjoy table service, a lively crowd, and a fun atmosphere. Reserve your spot early for the best view and drinks delivered right to your table.

tours.name: E-Bike
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before with StarBikes Rental! Choose from a diverse range of top-brand bikes, including E-bikes, tandems, and traditional 'omafiets'. Explore scenic bike paths or enjoy a countryside picnic with our rental options. Experience the city at your own pace with the perfect bike for every adventure!

tours.name: Sparta Granny Footbrake
tours.description: Rent a bike and explore the city with ease! Our unique omafiets features an open frame for effortless riding and a rear rack for your luggage. Equipped with lights and locks, these bikes ensure a safe and enjoyable adventure. Don’t forget your good mood and ID for a memorable day out!

tours.name: Spéciales (Tandem)
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before with StarBikes Rental! Choose from a diverse selection of top-brand bikes, including romantic tandem options and classic Dutch "omafiets." Explore scenic bike paths or venture into the countryside with a picnic basket. Experience the joy of cycling in a city designed for it!

tours.name: Fun2Go
tours.description: Discover the city like never before by renting a bike designed specifically for customers with disabilities. Enjoy a full day of exploration from opening to closing, ensuring a unique and memorable experience. Just bring your good mood and identification, and get ready for an adventure on two wheels!

tours.name: Velopair
tours.description: Discover the city like never before with our specially designed bike for disabled customers! Enjoy the freedom of exploration with a detachable wheelchair feature. Rent for a full day, from opening to closing, and embark on a memorable adventure. Just bring your good mood and valid ID for an unforgettable experience!

tours.name: Velo+
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before with our specially designed electric bike for disabled customers, allowing you to carry your own wheelchair. Enjoy a full day of exploration on our top-quality bikes, from E-bikes to traditional models, all at the lowest prices in the city. Adventure awaits!

tours.name: Mobility Scooter
tours.description: Explore the city like never before by renting a foldable scooter, designed specifically for seniors and those with mobility challenges. At StarBikes Rental, enjoy a diverse selection of top-quality bikes, including traditional Dutch models. Discover Amsterdam's scenic bike paths or venture into the countryside with ease and comfort.

tours.name: Smart Energy Deep Dive
tours.description: Join a 2.5-hour session exploring how citizens are transforming energy use—producing, trading, and shaping a sustainable future through innovative projects like City-zen.

tours.name: Smart Mobility Deep Dive
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s innovative mobility scene, from electric shared rides to autonomous boats, and learn how the city is shaping sustainable, smart transport solutions for the future.

tours.name: Circular City Deep Dive
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s bold move toward sustainability in a 2.5-hour session on smart solutions and circular economy policies shaping our future. Join innovators transforming raw material use today.

tours.name: Amsterdam Family - Private Intro tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam with your family on a fun 1.5-hour guided walk through iconic sights and hidden gems. Kids enjoy quizzes, treasure hunts, and tasty Dutch cookies while your host shares local tips and surprises.

tours.name: Paseo en Barco Ámsterdam
tours.description: Experience the enchanting canals of Amsterdam on a 75-minute boat tour that reveals the city's rich history and stunning architecture. Recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage site, these waterways showcase Amsterdam's Golden Age, offering a unique perspective of its iconic landmarks, all enhanced by an informative Spanish audio guide.

tours.name: [Academy] Intro to Improv Class
tours.description: Unlock your creativity with fun improv exercises that boost agreement, spontaneity, and listening skills—no experience needed. Join us and discover how to think on your feet in a welcoming, supportive environment.

tours.name: [Academy] Level 2 Class: The 2-Person Scene
tours.description: Master the art of scene-building in 8 weeks, crafting compelling moments rooted in emotion, relationships, and environment. Learn the essentials of 2-person scenes that fuel all improvisation styles.

tours.name: [Academy] Level 3 Class: Building Character
tours.description: Unleash your creativity over 8 weeks by mastering character building through physicality, emotion, status, and music. Craft compelling, multi-dimensional characters that leap off the page.

tours.name: [Academy] (Long-Form) Level 4 Class: Advanced Scenework
tours.description: Enhance your scene skills over 8 weeks, mastering organic starts, support moves, and opening devices. Build dynamic, supportive performances and showcase your growth in a final end-of-session performance.

tours.name: [Academy] Student Shows
tours.description: Watch talented Boom Chicago students shine in a lively 75-minute end-of-session showcase. Support the next generation of performers in this fun, energetic English-language performance.

tours.name: [Academy] (Long-Form) Level 5 Class: Finding The Game
tours.description: Master scene dynamics by mastering game and point of view, using tools like shiny objects and gift-giving to create engaging, synchronized performances. An 8-week journey ending in a live showcase.

tours.name: Stacejam: A Solo Musical Improv Show
tours.description: Watch Stacey Smith craft an entire world from a single suggestion, bringing dozens of characters to life through spontaneous scenes and songs in a lively, one-hour musical improv show.

tours.name: [Academy] Musical Improv: Level 1
tours.description: Unleash your inner performer with lively musical improv sessions. Sing, create, and laugh through spontaneous scenes that turn your ideas into unforgettable melodies every Sunday afternoon.

tours.name: Dinner Package
tours.description: Enjoy a 4-course dinner at ACE followed by the sensational Coqtales all-male show. Perfect for a lively girls’ night out with great food, drinks, and outrageous entertainment in Amsterdam.
